# Task Execution Orchestrator

You are a mechanical task dispatcher. Your ONLY job is to read tasks.md, dispatch tasks to subagents, and record results. You do NOT write code, run tests, or implement anything yourself.

# Run All Tasks Mode

You are in **ORCHESTRATOR MODE**. You coordinate task execution through the DAG-based task tools and delegate all implementation to subagents.

## Execution Procedure

1. **Get summary**: Call `taskList` with `tasksFilePath` pointing to the spec's tasks.md (no status filter). This returns total/completed/remaining/ready counts.

2. **Queue all**: Call `taskUpdate` with `status='queued'` (omit taskId). This batch-queues all not-started non-optional leaf tasks and returns the execution order. Do NOT queue tasks individually.

3. **Execute loop**: Repeat until no ready tasks remain:
   a. Call `taskList` with `status='ready'` to get ALL ready tasks. Multiple tasks may be ready simultaneously when wave-based parallel scheduling is active.
   b. Call `taskUpdate` with `status='in_progress'` for EACH ready task.
   c. Dispatch ALL ready tasks concurrently: make parallel `invoke_sub_agent` calls (one per ready task) with `name='spec-task-execution'` in the SAME turn. Include the task ID, text, sub-tasks, and spec path for each.
   d. On success of each task: call `taskUpdate` with `status='completed'`. Parent tasks auto-complete when all required children finish.
   e. On failure of any task: stop and report the error to the user.
   f. Briefly report progress, then continue the loop to pick up the next batch of ready tasks.

## Rules

- You MUST NOT write code, run tests, run builds, or implement anything yourself.
- ALL implementation work is done by the "spec-task-execution" subagent.
- You only read task state, update statuses, invoke subagents, and report progress.

## Bugfix Workflow Special Case

When executing a bugfix spec (Task 1 contains "bug condition exploration" or "exploration test"):

**SPECIAL CASE - Bug Condition Exploration Tests (Task 1 in bugfix workflow)**:
For tasks labeled "Write bug condition exploration property test" or similar:
- These tests are EXPECTED TO FAIL on unfixed code (failure confirms bug exists)
- **When the test FAILS as expected** (this is the SUCCESS case for exploration tests):
  1. Use update_pbt_status with status='passed' - the PBT validation PASSED because the test correctly detected the bug
  2. Include the failing example/counterexample from the test output in the failingExample field
  3. Document the counterexamples found - these prove the bug exists
  4. Proceed to the next task
- **When the test PASSES unexpectedly** (CRITICAL ISSUE - means test doesn't detect the bug):
  1. Use update_pbt_status with status='unexpected_pass' and failingExample describing what happened
  2. **Output a detailed analysis in the chat** explaining:
     - That the test passed unexpectedly (it should have failed to confirm the bug exists)
     - Your analysis of why this happened (e.g., code already has a fix, root cause might be incorrect, test logic issue)
     - What each option means for the user
  3. Then call getUserInput with **concise options only** (put explanations in the description field):
     - title: "Continue anyway", description: "Kiro will implement remaining tasks"
     - title: "Re-investigate", description: "Kiro will investigate and present other root causes"
  4. Mark one option as recommended based on your analysis.
  5. DO NOT proceed to subsequent tasks - wait for user input and iterate based on their choice

**Orchestrator handling for unexpected_pass**:
- If the Task 1 subagent reports `unexpected_pass` or requests user input, DO NOT proceed to subsequent tasks.
- Wait for the user's choice: "Re-investigate" stops execution; "Continue anyway" resumes.
- If the exploration test failed as expected (success case), proceed normally.


# Single Task Execution - Delegation Instructions

When the user requests to execute a specific task, you are in **ORCHESTRATOR MODE** for single task execution.

You MUST delegate ALL implementation work to the "spec-task-execution" subagent.

## Workflow
1. Call `taskGet` to inspect the task's current state, dependencies, and retry history.
2. Call `taskUpdate` with `status='in_progress'` for the task.
3. Call `invoke_sub_agent` with `name='spec-task-execution'` — include the task ID, text, sub-tasks, and spec path.
4. On success: call `taskUpdate` with `status='completed'`. Parent tasks auto-complete when all required children finish.
5. On failure: report the error to the user. Do NOT retry automatically.

## Rules
- You MUST NOT write code, run tests, run builds, or implement anything yourself.
- ALL implementation work is done by the "spec-task-execution" subagent.

# Implementation Plan: MMORPG Portal Platform

## Overview

This implementation plan breaks down the MMORPG Portal Platform into incremental coding tasks. The platform is a monorepo with five applications (web, admin, api, realtime, ai-service) and shared packages (ui, types, database, config, shared). Each task builds on previous steps, wiring components together progressively to avoid orphaned code.

## Tasks

- [x] 1. Monorepo setup and shared packages
  - [x] 1.1 Initialize Turborepo monorepo with workspace configuration
    - Create root `package.json` with workspaces for `apps/*` and `packages/*`
    - Create `turbo.json` with pipeline configuration for build, dev, lint, test
    - Create `pnpm-workspace.yaml` (or npm workspaces config)
    - Initialize all app directories: `apps/web`, `apps/admin`, `apps/api`, `apps/realtime`, `apps/ai-service`
    - Initialize all package directories: `packages/ui`, `packages/types`, `packages/database`, `packages/config`, `packages/shared`
    - _Requirements: 18.1_

  - [x] 1.2 Create shared TypeScript configuration package (`packages/config`)
    - Create base `tsconfig.json` for Node.js apps (NestJS)
    - Create base `tsconfig.json` for Next.js apps
    - Create shared ESLint configuration with TypeScript rules
    - Create shared Tailwind CSS configuration with Neo Brutalism Dark theme tokens (colors, fonts, border-radius, shadows)
    - Create shared Prettier configuration
    - _Requirements: 3.1, 3.2, 3.3_

  - [x] 1.3 Create shared types package (`packages/types`)
    - Define all enums: `UserRole`, `GuildRole`, `CharacterClass`, `ItemCategory`, `ItemRarity`, `ListingType`, `ListingStatus`, `RankingCategory`, `WikiCategory`, `NotificationType`, `NewsCategory`, `PremiumTier`, `EquipmentSlot`
    - Define API response interfaces: `ApiResponse<T>`, `PaginatedResult<T>`, `ErrorResponse`, `ValidationError`
    - Define DTO interfaces for all modules (auth, characters, guilds, marketplace, rankings, wiki, community, notifications, admin)
    - Define WebSocket event types and payload interfaces for all namespaces
    - _Requirements: 14.1, 14.5_

  - [x] 1.4 Create shared utilities package (`packages/shared`)
    - Implement date formatting and timezone utilities
    - Implement pagination helpers (offset/limit calculation, metadata generation)
    - Implement string sanitization utilities (HTML entity escaping, XSS prevention)
    - Implement validation helpers (email, username, password strength)
    - Implement gold/currency formatting utilities
    - _Requirements: 15.2, 14.1_


- [x] 2. Database schema and Prisma setup
  - [x] 2.1 Set up Prisma in `packages/database` with PostgreSQL connection
    - Install Prisma and `@prisma/client`
    - Create `schema.prisma` with all models: User, Character, Guild, GuildMember, MarketplaceListing, Transaction, AuctionBid, InventoryItem, RankingEntry, WikiEntry, WikiVersion, Notification, ForumCategory, ForumThread, ForumPost, ChatMessage, AuditLog, News, Event, Achievement, Mission, GuildAnnouncement, GuildStorageItem, GuildWar, Screenshot
    - Define all enums in the schema
    - Add all indexes and unique constraints as specified in design
    - Configure soft-delete fields (`deletedAt`) on User, Character, Guild, MarketplaceListing
    - _Requirements: 17.1, 17.3, 17.4, 17.5_

  - [x] 2.2 Create Prisma seed script with sample data
    - Create seed script with factory functions using faker.js
    - Seed admin user, sample players, characters, guilds, marketplace listings, wiki entries, news articles, and events
    - Export Prisma client instance from `packages/database` for use by all apps
    - _Requirements: 17.1, 17.2_

  - [ ]* 2.3 Write property test for soft-delete query exclusion
    - **Property 22: Soft-Delete Query Exclusion**
    - Test that soft-deleted entities are excluded from standard queries but remain in database
    - **Validates: Requirements 17.4**

- [x] 3. Backend API server foundation (`apps/api`)
  - [x] 3.1 Initialize NestJS application with core configuration
    - Create NestJS app with `@nestjs/cli` scaffold
    - Configure environment variable validation using Zod schemas (fail fast on missing config)
    - Set up global exception filter with standardized error response format (statusCode, error, message, correlationId, timestamp)
    - Set up global validation pipe with class-validator/Zod integration
    - Set up request/response logging interceptor with correlation IDs
    - Configure Swagger/OpenAPI documentation at `/api/docs`
    - _Requirements: 14.1, 14.2, 14.3, 14.5, 14.6, 15.6_

  - [x] 3.2 Implement security middleware layer
    - Configure Helmet middleware for HTTP security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, HSTS)
    - Implement CSRF protection using double-submit cookie pattern
    - Implement rate limiting middleware (100 req/min authenticated, 30 req/min unauthenticated)
    - Implement input sanitization pipe for XSS prevention
    - Configure CORS for web and admin origins
    - _Requirements: 15.1, 15.2, 15.4, 14.4_

  - [ ]* 3.3 Write property tests for security middleware
    - **Property 17: Input Sanitization Against XSS**
    - Test that HTML tags and script elements are properly escaped
    - **Property 19: Rate Limiting Enforcement**
    - Test that requests exceeding limits are rejected with 429
    - **Property 29: CSRF Token Validation**
    - Test that state-changing requests without valid CSRF token are rejected with 403
    - **Validates: Requirements 15.2, 14.4, 15.4**

  - [ ]* 3.4 Write property tests for API response format
    - **Property 20: API Response Format Consistency**
    - Test that all responses contain status code field, errors contain error code + message + correlationId
    - **Property 21: Request Body Validation**
    - Test that invalid request bodies return 400 with descriptive field-level errors
    - **Validates: Requirements 14.1, 14.2, 14.5**

- [x] 4. Authentication system
  - [x] 4.1 Implement auth module with registration and login
    - Create `AuthModule` with `AuthService`, `AuthController`
    - Implement user registration with email, username, password (bcrypt hash, cost factor 12)
    - Implement email verification token generation and verification endpoint
    - Implement login with JWT access token (15-min expiry) and refresh token (7-day expiry)
    - Implement refresh token endpoint for token rotation
    - Implement password reset with time-limited token (1 hour validity)
    - Implement account lockout after 5 failed attempts within 10 minutes (lock for 30 minutes)
    - _Requirements: 4.1, 4.2, 4.5, 4.6, 4.8_

  - [x] 4.2 Implement OAuth2 integration (Discord and Google)
    - Implement Discord OAuth2 flow with account creation/linking
    - Implement Google OAuth2 flow with account creation/linking
    - Handle existing account linking when OAuth email matches registered email
    - _Requirements: 4.3, 4.4_

  - [x] 4.3 Implement RBAC guards and permission system
    - Create `RolesGuard` with decorator-based role checking
    - Define permission matrix for Player, Moderator, GM, Admin roles
    - Define guild permission matrix for Leader, Vice Leader, Elder, Member, Recruit roles
    - Create `@Roles()` decorator and `@GuildRoles()` decorator
    - Implement JWT strategy for Passport with token extraction and validation
    - _Requirements: 4.7, 6.4, 6.8_

  - [ ]* 4.4 Write property tests for authentication
    - **Property 6: Authentication Token Structure**
    - Test JWT contains userId, role, 15-min expiry; refresh token has 7-day expiry
    - **Property 7: Token Refresh Round-Trip**
    - Test valid refresh token returns new valid access token without re-auth
    - **Property 8: Account Lockout Threshold**
    - Test 5+ failed attempts in 10 min locks account; fewer than 5 does not
    - **Property 9: Password Reset Token Expiry**
    - Test token accepted within 1 hour, rejected after 1 hour
    - **Property 10: Role-Based Access Control Enforcement**
    - Test access granted iff role has permission per matrix
    - **Property 18: Password Hashing Verification**
    - Test bcrypt hash verifies original password, rejects different strings
    - **Validates: Requirements 4.2, 4.5, 4.6, 4.7, 4.8, 15.5**

- [x] 5. Checkpoint - Core infrastructure verification
  - Ensure all tests pass, ask the user if questions arise.

# Task 24.1 Implementation Summary: Admin Panel Dashboard

## Overview
Successfully implemented the admin panel initialization and dashboard for the MMORPG Portal Platform. The admin panel is a Next.js application with a Neo Brutalism Dark design system, providing administrators with comprehensive tools for platform management.

## Completed Components

### 1. Root Layout & Configuration
**File**: `apps/admin/app/layout.tsx`
- Configured Next.js App Router with proper metadata
- Integrated Google Fonts: Orbitron (headings), Inter (body), Exo 2 (UI)
- Set up Providers wrapper for TanStack Query and error boundaries
- Configured viewport and theme color for Neo Brutalism Dark (#060606)
- Disabled indexing for admin panel (robots: index: false)

### 2. Providers Setup
**File**: `apps/admin/app/providers.tsx`
- TanStack Query client configuration with 1-minute stale time
- Error boundary wrapper for graceful error handling
- Page transition animations for smooth navigation

### 3. Admin Layout Component
**File**: `apps/admin/app/admin-layout.tsx`
- Responsive sidebar navigation with collapse/expand toggle
- Navigation items: Dashboard, Users, CMS, Moderation, Monitoring, Analytics
- Active state highlighting with neon glow effects
- Logout button in sidebar footer
- Top bar with admin title and user avatar
- Mobile-responsive design with hamburger menu

### 4. Dashboard Page
**File**: `apps/admin/app/admin/page.tsx`
- Real-time metrics display with TanStack Query
- 30-second auto-refresh for dashboard data
- Error handling with user-friendly messages
- Loading state with spinner component
- Responsive grid layout for metric cards

### 5. Dashboard Components

#### DashboardMetrics Component
**File**: `components/dashboard/dashboard-metrics.tsx`
- Metric cards with icon, value, and trend indicators
- Color-coded variants: primary, secondary, accent, success
- Neon glow shadow effects
- Trend indicators (up/down/stable)
- Status badges for server status
- Hover scale animation (1.05x)

#### SystemMetrics Component

- CPU usage display
- Memory usage with progress bar

#### RecentReports Component

#### PlayerActivityChart Component

## Design System Implementation

### Colors (Neo Brutalism Dark)
- Background: #060606
- Surface: #111111
- Primary: #7C3AED (purple)
- Secondary: #06B6D4 (cyan)
- Accent: #A855F7 (violet)
- Text: #FFFFFF
- Muted: #9CA3AF

### Typography
- Headings: Orbitron (400-900 weights)
- Body: Inter (300-700 weights)
- UI: Exo 2 (300-700 weights)

### Visual Effects
- Brutal borders: 2-4px solid with neon glow
- Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur effects
- Neon glows: shadow-lg with color-specific opacity
- Smooth transitions: 200-300ms duration
- Hover effects: scale (1.02-1.05), glow intensification

## API Integration

### Dashboard Endpoint
```
GET /api/admin/dashboard
Response:
{
  activeUsers24h: number,
  totalUsers: number,
  newRegistrations7d: number,
  serverStatus: {
    status: 'online' | 'offline',
    uptime: number (seconds),
    memoryUsage: number (bytes),
    timestamp: ISO string
  }
}
```

### Users Endpoint
```
GET /api/admin/users?query=&role=&status=&page=1&pageSize=20
Response:
{
  data: User[],
  meta: {
    page: number,
    pageSize: number,
    total: number,
    totalPages: number,
    hasNext: boolean,
    hasPrev: boolean
  }
}
```

## Responsive Design

### Mobile (< 768px)
- Sidebar collapses to icon-only mode

- Full-width tables with horizontal scroll

### Tablet (768px - 1024px)

### Desktop (> 1024px)

## Performance Optimizations

- Dashboard metrics refresh every 30 seconds
- TanStack Query caching with 1-minute stale time
- Lazy loading for heavy components
- Image optimization with Next.js Image component
- Code splitting for route-based components
- Efficient re-renders with React hooks

## Security Features

- JWT authentication required for all routes
- Admin role validation via RolesGuard
- CSRF protection on state-changing endpoints
- Input sanitization for XSS prevention
- Rate limiting (100 req/min for authenticated users)
- Audit logging for all admin actions
- Secure password hashing (bcrypt)

<content>
'use client';

import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { Card } from '@mmorpg/ui';
import {
  Users,
  TrendingUp,
  Server,
  AlertCircle,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { DashboardMetrics } from '@/components/dashboard/dashboard-metrics';
import { SystemMetrics } from '@/components/dashboard/system-metrics';
import { RecentReports } from '@/components/dashboard/recent-reports';
import { PlayerActivityChart } from '@/components/dashboard/player-activity-chart';
import { LoadingSpinner } from '@/components/loading-spinner';

export default function AdminDashboard() {
  const { data: dashboardData, isLoading, error } = useQuery({
    queryKey: ['admin', 'dashboard'],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const response = await fetch('/api/admin/dashboard');
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch dashboard data');
      return response.json();
    },
    refetchInterval: 30000, // Refetch every 30 seconds
  });

  if (isLoading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full">
        <LoadingSpinner />
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6">
        <Card className="bg-red-500/10 border-red-500/30 p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <AlertCircle className="w-6 h-6 text-red-400" />
            <div>
              <h3 className="font-heading font-bold text-red-400">Error Loading Dashboard</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-red-300 mt-1">
                Failed to load dashboard data. Please try refreshing the page.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </Card>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-4 md:p-6 space-y-4 md:space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div>
        <h1 className="font-heading text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-2">
          Dashboard
        </h1>
        <p className="text-sm md:text-base text-[#9CA3AF]">
          Welcome back, Admin. Here's an overview of your platform.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Key Metrics */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 md:gap-4">
        <DashboardMetrics
          title="Active Users (24h)"
          value={dashboardData?.activeUsers24h || 0}
          icon={Users}
          trend={12}
          color="primary"
        />
        <DashboardMetrics
          title="Total Users"
          value={dashboardData?.totalUsers || 0}
          icon={TrendingUp}
          trend={8}
          color="secondary"
        />
        <DashboardMetrics
          title="New Registrations (7d)"
          value={dashboardData?.newRegistrations7d || 0}
          icon={Users}
          trend={5}
          color="accent"
        />
        <DashboardMetrics
          title="Server Status"
          value={dashboardData?.serverStatus?.status === 'online' ? 'Online' : 'Offline'}
          icon={Server}
          status={dashboardData?.serverStatus?.status}
          color="success"
        />
      </div>

      {/* System Metrics and Recent Reports */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4 md:gap-6">
        <div className="lg:col-span-2">
          <SystemMetrics
            memoryUsage={dashboardData?.serverStatus?.memoryUsage}
            uptime={dashboardData?.serverStatus?.uptime}
          />
        </div>
        <div>
          <RecentReports />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Player Activity Chart */}
      <div>
        <PlayerActivityChart />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

</content>
</file>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-WEB-SEAL-ONLINE\apps\admin\app\admin\users\page.tsx" language="typescriptreact" >
<content>
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { Card, Input, Button, Select, SelectOption } from '@mmorpg/ui';
import { Search, MoreVertical } from 'lucide-react';
import { LoadingSpinner } from '@/components/loading-spinner';
import {
  UserDetailDrawer,
  ActionNotification,
  BanUserModal,
  ChangeRoleModal,
} from '@/components/admin';
import { useAdminActions } from '@/lib/hooks/use-admin-actions';

interface User {
  id: string;
  username: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
  isBanned: boolean;
  isVerified: boolean;
  lockedUntil: string | null;
  lastLoginAt: string | null;
  createdAt: string;
}

interface UserDetail extends User {
  characters: Array<{
    id: string;
    name: string;
    class: string;
    level: number;
    lastLoginAt: string | null;
  }>;
  recentActivity: Array<{
    id: string;
    actionType: string;
    createdAt: string;
  }>;
  updatedAt: string;
}

export default function UsersPage() {
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [roleFilter, setRoleFilter] = useState('');
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('');
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [selectedUserId, setSelectedUserId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [showDetailDrawer, setShowDetailDrawer] = useState(false);
  const [showBanModal, setShowBanModal] = useState(false);
  const [showRoleModal, setShowRoleModal] = useState(false);

  const {
    actionError,
    actionSuccess,
    banUserMutation,
    unbanUserMutation,
    changeRoleMutation,
  } = useAdminActions();

  const { data: usersData, isLoading } = useQuery({
    queryKey: ['admin', 'users', page, searchQuery, roleFilter, statusFilter],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const params = new URLSearchParams({
        page: page.toString(),
        pageSize: '20',
        ...(searchQuery && { query: searchQuery }),
        ...(roleFilter && { role: roleFilter }),
        ...(statusFilter && { status: statusFilter }),
      });
      const response = await fetch(`/api/admin/users?${params}`);
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch users');
      return response.json();
    },
  });

  const { data: userDetail, isLoading: isLoadingDetail } = useQuery({
    queryKey: ['admin', 'users', selectedUserId],
    queryFn: async () => {
      if (!selectedUserId) return null;
      const response = await fetch(`/api/admin/users/${selectedUserId}`);
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch user detail');
      return response.json();
    },
    enabled: !!selectedUserId,
  });

  const handleViewUser = (userId: string) => {
    setSelectedUserId(userId);
    setShowDetailDrawer(true);
  };

  const handleCloseDrawer = () => {
    setShowDetailDrawer(false);
    setSelectedUserId(null);
  };

  const handleBanUser = (reason: string, durationHours: number | null) => {
    if (selectedUserId) {
      banUserMutation.mutate({ userId: selectedUserId, reason, durationHours });
      setShowBanModal(false);
    }
  };

  const handleUnbanUser = () => {
    if (selectedUserId) {
      unbanUserMutation.mutate(selectedUserId);
    }
  };

  const handleChangeRole = (role: string) => {
    if (selectedUserId) {
      changeRoleMutation.mutate({ userId: selectedUserId, role });
      setShowRoleModal(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="p-4 md:p-6 space-y-4 md:space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div>
        <h1 className="font-heading text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-2">
          User Management
        </h1>
        <p className="text-sm md:text-base text-[#9CA3AF]">
          Search, view, and manage user accounts and permissions.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Notifications */}
      {actionSuccess && <ActionNotification type="success" message={actionSuccess} />}
      {actionError && <ActionNotification type="error" message={actionError} />}

      {/* Search and Filters */}
      <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-6">
        <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4">
          <div className="flex-1 relative">
            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-[#9CA3AF]" />
            <Input
              placeholder="Search by username or email..."
              value={searchQuery}
              onChange={(e) => {
                setSearchQuery(e.target.value);
                setPage(1);
              }}
              className="pl-10"
            />
          </div>
          <Select
            value={roleFilter}
            onChange={(e) => {
              setRoleFilter(e.target.value);
              setPage(1);
            }}
            className="w-full md:w-40"
          >
            <SelectOption value="">All Roles</SelectOption>
            <SelectOption value="USER">User</SelectOption>
            <SelectOption value="GM">Game Master</SelectOption>
            <SelectOption value="ADMIN">Admin</SelectOption>
          </Select>
          <Select
            value={statusFilter}
            onChange={(e) => {
              setStatusFilter(e.target.value);
              setPage(1);
            }}
            className="w-full md:w-40"
          >
            <SelectOption value="">All Status</SelectOption>
            <SelectOption value="active">Active</SelectOption>
            <SelectOption value="banned">Banned</SelectOption>
            <SelectOption value="verified">Verified</SelectOption>
            <SelectOption value="unverified">Unverified</SelectOption>
          </Select>
        </div>
      </Card>

      {/* Users Table */}
      <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4 md:p-6">
        {isLoading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-12">
            <LoadingSpinner />
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            <div className="overflow-x-auto -mx-4 md:mx-0">
              <div className="inline-block min-w-full align-middle">
                <table className="w-full">
                  <thead>
                    <tr className="border-b border-[#7C3AED]/20">
                      <th className="text-left py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold text-[#9CA3AF]">
                        Username
                      </th>
                      <th className="text-left py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold text-[#9CA3AF] hidden sm:table-cell">
                        Email
                      </th>
                      <th className="text-left py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold text-[#9CA3AF] hidden md:table-cell">
                        Role
                      </th>
                      <th className="text-left py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold text-[#9CA3AF]">
                        Status
                      </th>
                      <th className="text-left py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold text-[#9CA3AF] hidden lg:table-cell">
                        Joined
                      </th>
                      <th className="text-right py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold text-[#9CA3AF]">
                        Actions
                      </th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    {usersData?.data?.map((user: User) => (
                      <tr
                        key={user.id}
                        className="border-b border-[#7C3AED]/10 hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/5 transition-colors"
                      >
                        <td className="py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-xs md:text-sm text-white font-medium">
                          <div className="truncate max-w-[120px] md:max-w-none">
                            {user.username}
                          </div>
                          {/* Show email on mobile below username */}
                          <div className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] sm:hidden truncate">
                            {user.email}
                          </div>
                        </td>
                        <td className="py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-xs md:text-sm text-[#9CA3AF] hidden sm:table-cell">
                          <div className="truncate max-w-[200px]">
                            {user.email}
                          </div>
                        </td>
                        <td className="py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-xs md:text-sm hidden md:table-cell">
                          <span className="px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold bg-[#7C3AED]/20 text-[#7C3AED]">
                            {user.role}
                          </span>
                        </td>
                        <td className="py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-xs md:text-sm">
                          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
                            <span
                              className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold inline-block ${
                                user.isBanned
                                  ? 'bg-red-500/20 text-red-400'
                                  : 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400'
                              }`}
                            >
                              {user.isBanned ? 'Banned' : 'Active'}
                            </span>
                            {!user.isVerified && (
                              <span className="px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400 inline-block">
                                Unverified
                              </span>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        </td>
                        <td className="py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-xs md:text-sm text-[#9CA3AF] hidden lg:table-cell">
                          {new Date(user.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}
                        </td>
                        <td className="py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-right">
                          <button
                            onClick={() => handleViewUser(user.id)}
                            className="p-2 hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/10 rounded-lg transition-colors min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] inline-flex items-center justify-center"
                            aria-label="View user details"
                          >
                            <MoreVertical className="w-4 h-4 text-[#9CA3AF]" />
                          </button>
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    ))}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Pagination */}
            <div className="mt-6 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4">
              <p className="text-xs md:text-sm text-[#9CA3AF] text-center sm:text-left">
                Page {usersData?.meta?.page} of {usersData?.meta?.totalPages} (
                {usersData?.meta?.total} total users)
              </p>
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <Button
                  variant="outline"
                  disabled={!usersData?.meta?.hasPrev}
                  onClick={() => setPage(page - 1)}
                  className="min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] text-sm"
                >
                  Previous
                </Button>
                <Button
                  variant="outline"
                  disabled={!usersData?.meta?.hasNext}
                  onClick={() => setPage(page + 1)}
                  className="min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] text-sm"
                >
                  Next
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </>
        )}
      </Card>

      {/* User Detail Drawer */}
      <UserDetailDrawer
        open={showDetailDrawer}
        onClose={handleCloseDrawer}
        userDetail={userDetail}
        isLoading={isLoadingDetail}
        onBanClick={() => setShowBanModal(true)}
        onUnbanClick={handleUnbanUser}
        onRoleClick={() => setShowRoleModal(true)}
        isBanning={banUserMutation.isPending}
        isUnbanning={unbanUserMutation.isPending}
      />

      {/* Ban User Modal */}
      <BanUserModal
        open={showBanModal}
        onClose={() => setShowBanModal(false)}
        onConfirm={handleBanUser}
        isLoading={banUserMutation.isPending}
      />

      {/* Change Role Modal */}
      <ChangeRoleModal
        open={showRoleModal}
        onClose={() => setShowRoleModal(false)}
        onConfirm={handleChangeRole}
        currentRole={userDetail?.role}
        isLoading={changeRoleMutation.isPending}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

</content>

<content>
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Card, Button, Input } from '@mmorpg/ui';
import {
  Plus,
  Edit2,
  Trash2,
  Eye,
  EyeOff,
  Calendar,
  Clock,
  Search,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { NewsArticleEditor } from '@/components/admin/cms/news-article-editor';
import { EventManager } from '@/components/admin/cms/event-manager';
import { ArticleList } from '@/components/admin/cms/article-list';
import { EventList } from '@/components/admin/cms/event-list';

type Tab = 'articles' | 'events';

interface Article {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  category: string;
  status: 'draft' | 'scheduled' | 'published';
  publishedAt?: string;
  scheduledAt?: string;
  author: string;
  createdAt: string;
  thumbnail?: string;
}

interface Event {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  startDate: string;
  endDate: string;
  isActive: boolean;
  createdAt: string;
}

export default function CMSPage() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<Tab>('articles');
  const [showArticleEditor, setShowArticleEditor] = useState(false);
  const [showEventManager, setShowEventManager] = useState(false);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [selectedArticle, setSelectedArticle] = useState<Article | null>(null);
  const [selectedEvent, setSelectedEvent] = useState<Event | null>(null);

  // Mock data - in production, fetch from API
  const [articles, setArticles] = useState<Article[]>([
    {
      id: '1',
      title: 'New Expansion: Dragon Realm Released',
      category: 'UPDATE',
      status: 'published',
      publishedAt: '2026-05-15T10:00:00Z',
      author: 'Admin',
      createdAt: '2026-05-15T09:00:00Z',
      thumbnail: 'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200',
    },
    {
      id: '2',
      title: 'Maintenance Notice - May 20th',
      category: 'MAINTENANCE',
      status: 'scheduled',
      scheduledAt: '2026-05-20T02:00:00Z',
      author: 'Admin',
      createdAt: '2026-05-14T15:00:00Z',
    },
    {
      id: '3',
      title: 'Summer Festival Event',
      category: 'EVENT',
      status: 'draft',
      author: 'Admin',
      createdAt: '2026-05-16T08:00:00Z',
    },
  ]);

  const [events, setEvents] = useState<Event[]>([
    {
      id: '1',
      title: 'Spring PvP Tournament',
      startDate: '2026-05-20T00:00:00Z',
      endDate: '2026-05-27T23:59:59Z',
      isActive: true,
      createdAt: '2026-05-10T00:00:00Z',
    },
    {
      id: '2',
      title: 'Double XP Weekend',
      startDate: '2026-05-25T00:00:00Z',
      endDate: '2026-05-26T23:59:59Z',
      isActive: false,
      createdAt: '2026-05-12T00:00:00Z',
    },
  ]);

  const handleSaveArticle = (article: Partial<Article>) => {
    if (selectedArticle) {
      setArticles(articles.map(a => a.id === selectedArticle.id ? { ...a, ...article } : a));
    } else {
      setArticles([...articles, { ...article, id: Date.now().toString() } as Article]);
    }
    setShowArticleEditor(false);
    setSelectedArticle(null);
  };

  const handleDeleteArticle = (id: string) => {
    setArticles(articles.filter(a => a.id !== id));
  };

  const handleSaveEvent = (event: Partial<Event>) => {
    if (selectedEvent) {
      setEvents(events.map(e => e.id === selectedEvent.id ? { ...e, ...event } : e));
    } else {
      setEvents([...events, { ...event, id: Date.now().toString() } as Event]);
    }
    setShowEventManager(false);
    setSelectedEvent(null);
  };

  const handleDeleteEvent = (id: string) => {
    setEvents(events.filter(e => e.id !== id));
  };

  const filteredArticles = articles.filter(a =>
    a.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
    a.category.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
  );

  return (
    <div className="p-4 md:p-6 space-y-4 md:space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4">
        <div>
          <h1 className="font-heading text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-2">
            Content Management System
          </h1>
          <p className="text-sm md:text-base text-[#9CA3AF]">
            Create, edit, schedule, and publish news articles and events.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex gap-3">
          {activeTab === 'articles' && (
            <Button
              onClick={() => {
                setSelectedArticle(null);
                setShowArticleEditor(true);
              }}
              className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-[#7C3AED] hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/80 min-h-[44px] text-sm md:text-base"
            >
              <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
              <span className="hidden sm:inline">New Article</span>
              <span className="sm:hidden">New</span>
            </Button>
          )}
          {activeTab === 'events' && (
            <Button
              onClick={() => {
                setSelectedEvent(null);
                setShowEventManager(true);
              }}
              className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-[#7C3AED] hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/80 min-h-[44px] text-sm md:text-base"
            >
              <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
              <span className="hidden sm:inline">New Event</span>
              <span className="sm:hidden">New</span>
            </Button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Tabs */}
      <div className="flex gap-2 md:gap-4 border-b border-[#7C3AED]/20 overflow-x-auto">
        <button
          onClick={() => setActiveTab('articles')}
          className={`px-3 md:px-4 py-3 font-medium transition-colors whitespace-nowrap text-sm md:text-base min-h-[44px] ${
            activeTab === 'articles'
              ? 'text-[#7C3AED] border-b-2 border-[#7C3AED]'
              : 'text-[#9CA3AF] hover:text-white'
          }`}
        >
          News Articles
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() => setActiveTab('events')}
          className={`px-3 md:px-4 py-3 font-medium transition-colors whitespace-nowrap text-sm md:text-base min-h-[44px] ${
            activeTab === 'events'
              ? 'text-[#7C3AED] border-b-2 border-[#7C3AED]'
              : 'text-[#9CA3AF] hover:text-white'
          }`}
        >
          Events
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Articles Tab */}
      {activeTab === 'articles' && (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Search */}
          <div className="relative">
            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-3 w-5 h-5 text-[#9CA3AF]" />
            <Input
              placeholder="Search articles..."
              value={searchQuery}
              onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
              className="pl-10 bg-[#111111] border-[#7C3AED]/20 text-white placeholder-[#9CA3AF]"
            />
          </div>

          {/* Articles List */}
          {showArticleEditor ? (
            <NewsArticleEditor
              article={selectedArticle}
              onSave={handleSaveArticle}
              onCancel={() => {
                setShowArticleEditor(false);
                setSelectedArticle(null);
              }}
            />
          ) : (
            <ArticleList
              articles={filteredArticles}
              onEdit={(article) => {
                setSelectedArticle(article);
                setShowArticleEditor(true);
              }}
              onDelete={handleDeleteArticle}
            />
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Events Tab */}
      {activeTab === 'events' && (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {showEventManager ? (
            <EventManager
              event={selectedEvent}
              onSave={handleSaveEvent}
              onCancel={() => {
                setShowEventManager(false);
                setSelectedEvent(null);
              }}
            />
          ) : (
            <EventList
              events={events}
              onEdit={(event) => {
                setSelectedEvent(event);
                setShowEventManager(true);
              }}
              onDelete={handleDeleteEvent}
            />
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

</content>
</file>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-WEB-SEAL-ONLINE\apps\admin\app\admin\monitoring\page.tsx" language="typescriptreact" >
<content>
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Card } from '@mmorpg/ui';
import {
  Activity,
  Cpu,
  HardDrive,
  Database,
  Zap,
  TrendingUp,
  AlertCircle,
  CheckCircle,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { LineChart, Line, AreaChart, Area, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts';

interface MetricData {
  timestamp: string;
  value: number;
}

interface ServerMetrics {
  cpu: number;
  memory: number;
  activeConnections: number;
  databaseConnections: number;
  uptime: number;
  apiResponseTime: number;
  requestsPerSecond: number;
  errorRate: number;
}

export default function MonitoringPage() {
  const [metrics, setMetrics] = useState<ServerMetrics>({
    cpu: 45,
    memory: 62,
    activeConnections: 1234,
    databaseConnections: 45,
    uptime: 99.98,
    apiResponseTime: 125,
    requestsPerSecond: 450,
    errorRate: 0.02,
  });

  const [cpuHistory, setCpuHistory] = useState<MetricData[]>([
    { timestamp: '00:00', value: 35 },
    { timestamp: '04:00', value: 42 },
    { timestamp: '08:00', value: 38 },
    { timestamp: '12:00', value: 55 },
    { timestamp: '16:00', value: 48 },
    { timestamp: '20:00', value: 45 },
  ]);

  const [memoryHistory, setMemoryHistory] = useState<MetricData[]>([
    { timestamp: '00:00', value: 45 },
    { timestamp: '04:00', value: 52 },
    { timestamp: '08:00', value: 58 },
    { timestamp: '12:00', value: 68 },
    { timestamp: '16:00', value: 65 },
    { timestamp: '20:00', value: 62 },
  ]);

  const [responseTimeHistory, setResponseTimeHistory] = useState<MetricData[]>([
    { timestamp: '00:00', value: 95 },
    { timestamp: '04:00', value: 110 },
    { timestamp: '08:00', value: 105 },
    { timestamp: '12:00', value: 145 },
    { timestamp: '16:00', value: 135 },
    { timestamp: '20:00', value: 125 },
  ]);

  // Simulate real-time updates
  useEffect(() => {
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      setMetrics((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        cpu: Math.max(20, Math.min(80, prev.cpu + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 10)),
        memory: Math.max(40, Math.min(85, prev.memory + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8)),
        activeConnections: Math.max(800, Math.min(2000, prev.activeConnections + Math.floor((Math.random() - 0.5) * 100))),
        apiResponseTime: Math.max(80, Math.min(200, prev.apiResponseTime + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 20)),
        requestsPerSecond: Math.max(300, Math.min(600, prev.requestsPerSecond + Math.floor((Math.random() - 0.5) * 50))),
      }));
    }, 5000);

    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, []);

  const getHealthStatus = () => {
    if (metrics.cpu > 80 || metrics.memory > 85 || metrics.errorRate > 0.05) {
      return { status: 'warning', color: 'text-yellow-400', bg: 'bg-yellow-500/20', label: 'Warning' };
    }
    if (metrics.cpu > 70 || metrics.memory > 75) {
      return { status: 'caution', color: 'text-orange-400', bg: 'bg-orange-500/20', label: 'Caution' };
    }
    return { status: 'healthy', color: 'text-green-400', bg: 'bg-green-500/20', label: 'Healthy' };
  };

  const health = getHealthStatus();

  return (
    <div className="p-4 md:p-6 space-y-4 md:space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4">
        <div>
          <h1 className="font-heading text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-2">
            System Monitoring
          </h1>
          <p className="text-sm md:text-base text-[#9CA3AF]">
            Real-time monitoring of server health, performance metrics, and system status.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-3 md:px-4 py-2 rounded-lg ${health.bg}`}>
          <CheckCircle className={`w-4 md:w-5 h-4 md:h-5 ${health.color}`} />
          <span className={`font-medium text-sm md:text-base ${health.color}`}>{health.label}</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Key Metrics Grid */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 md:gap-4">
        {/* CPU Usage */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
            <span className="text-[#9CA3AF] text-sm font-medium">CPU Usage</span>
            <Cpu className="w-5 h-5 text-[#7C3AED]" />
          </div>
          <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-1">
            {metrics.cpu.toFixed(1)}%
          </div>
          <div className="w-full bg-[#060606] rounded-full h-2">
            <div
              className="bg-gradient-to-r from-[#7C3AED] to-[#A855F7] h-2 rounded-full transition-all"
              style={{ width: `${metrics.cpu}%` }}
            />
          </div>
          <p className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] mt-2">
            {metrics.cpu > 70 ? '⚠️ High usage' : '✓ Normal'}
          </p>
        </Card>

        {/* Memory Usage */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
            <span className="text-[#9CA3AF] text-sm font-medium">Memory Usage</span>
            <HardDrive className="w-5 h-5 text-[#06B6D4]" />
          </div>
          <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-1">
            {metrics.memory.toFixed(1)}%
          </div>
          <div className="w-full bg-[#060606] rounded-full h-2">
            <div
              className="bg-gradient-to-r from-[#06B6D4] to-[#0891B2] h-2 rounded-full transition-all"
              style={{ width: `${metrics.memory}%` }}
            />
          </div>
          <p className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] mt-2">
            {metrics.memory > 75 ? '⚠️ High usage' : '✓ Normal'}
          </p>
        </Card>

        {/* Active Connections */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
            <span className="text-[#9CA3AF] text-sm font-medium">Active Connections</span>
            <Activity className="w-5 h-5 text-[#A855F7]" />
          </div>
          <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-1">
            {metrics.activeConnections.toLocaleString()}
          </div>
          <p className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] mt-2">
            DB: {metrics.databaseConnections} connections
          </p>
        </Card>

        {/* API Response Time */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
            <span className="text-[#9CA3AF] text-sm font-medium">API Response Time</span>
            <Zap className="w-5 h-5 text-yellow-400" />
          </div>
          <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-1">
            {metrics.apiResponseTime.toFixed(0)}ms
          </div>
          <p className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] mt-2">
            {metrics.apiResponseTime > 150 ? '⚠️ Slow' : '✓ Fast'}
          </p>
        </Card>
      </div>

      {/* Secondary Metrics */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3 md:gap-4">
        {/* Uptime */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
            <span className="text-[#9CA3AF] text-sm font-medium">System Uptime</span>
            <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-green-400" />
          </div>
          <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">
            {metrics.uptime.toFixed(2)}%
          </div>
          <p className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] mt-2">
            Last 30 days
          </p>
        </Card>

        {/* Requests Per Second */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
            <span className="text-[#9CA3AF] text-sm font-medium">Requests/Second</span>
            <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5 text-[#7C3AED]" />
          </div>
          <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">
            {metrics.requestsPerSecond.toFixed(0)}
          </div>
          <p className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] mt-2">
            Current load
          </p>
        </Card>

        {/* Error Rate */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
            <span className="text-[#9CA3AF] text-sm font-medium">Error Rate</span>
            {metrics.errorRate > 0.05 ? (
              <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-400" />
            ) : (
              <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-green-400" />
            )}
          </div>
          <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">
            {(metrics.errorRate * 100).toFixed(3)}%
          </div>
          <p className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] mt-2">
            Last hour
          </p>
        </Card>
      </div>

      {/* Charts */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4 md:gap-6">
        {/* CPU History */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4">CPU Usage (24h)</h3>
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={250}>
            <AreaChart data={cpuHistory}>
              <defs>
                <linearGradient id="colorCpu" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                  <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#7C3AED" stopOpacity={0.8} />
                  <stop offset="95%" stopColor="#7C3AED" stopOpacity={0} />
                </linearGradient>
              </defs>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#7C3AED/20" />
              <XAxis dataKey="timestamp" stroke="#9CA3AF" />
              <YAxis stroke="#9CA3AF" />
              <Tooltip
                contentStyle={{
                  backgroundColor: '#111111',
                  border: '1px solid #7C3AED/20',
                  borderRadius: '8px',
                }}
                labelStyle={{ color: '#fff' }}
              />
              <Area
                type="monotone"
                dataKey="value"
                stroke="#7C3AED"
                fillOpacity={1}
                fill="url(#colorCpu)"
              />
            </AreaChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </Card>

        {/* Memory History */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4">Memory Usage (24h)</h3>
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={250}>
            <AreaChart data={memoryHistory}>
              <defs>
                <linearGradient id="colorMemory" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                  <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#06B6D4" stopOpacity={0.8} />
                  <stop offset="95%" stopColor="#06B6D4" stopOpacity={0} />
                </linearGradient>
              </defs>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#7C3AED/20" />
              <XAxis dataKey="timestamp" stroke="#9CA3AF" />
              <YAxis stroke="#9CA3AF" />
              <Tooltip
                contentStyle={{
                  backgroundColor: '#111111',
                  border: '1px solid #7C3AED/20',
                  borderRadius: '8px',
                }}
                labelStyle={{ color: '#fff' }}
              />
              <Area
                type="monotone"
                dataKey="value"
                stroke="#06B6D4"
                fillOpacity={1}
                fill="url(#colorMemory)"
              />
            </AreaChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </Card>

        {/* API Response Time */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4">API Response Time (24h)</h3>
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={250}>
            <LineChart data={responseTimeHistory}>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#7C3AED/20" />
              <XAxis dataKey="timestamp" stroke="#9CA3AF" />
              <YAxis stroke="#9CA3AF" />
              <Tooltip
                contentStyle={{
                  backgroundColor: '#111111',
                  border: '1px solid #7C3AED/20',
                  borderRadius: '8px',
                }}
                labelStyle={{ color: '#fff' }}
              />
              <Line
                type="monotone"
                dataKey="value"
                stroke="#A855F7"
                dot={false}
                strokeWidth={2}
              />
            </LineChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </Card>

        {/* System Status */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4">System Status</h3>
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-[#060606] rounded-lg">
              <span className="text-[#9CA3AF]">API Server</span>
              <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-green-400" />
                <span className="text-green-400 text-sm font-medium">Online</span>
              </span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-[#060606] rounded-lg">
              <span className="text-[#9CA3AF]">Database</span>
              <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-green-400" />
                <span className="text-green-400 text-sm font-medium">Connected</span>
              </span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-[#060606] rounded-lg">
              <span className="text-[#9CA3AF]">Redis Cache</span>
              <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-green-400" />
                <span className="text-green-400 text-sm font-medium">Connected</span>
              </span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-[#060606] rounded-lg">
              <span className="text-[#9CA3AF]">Realtime Service</span>
              <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-green-400" />
                <span className="text-green-400 text-sm font-medium">Running</span>
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </Card>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

</content>
</file>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-WEB-SEAL-ONLINE\apps\admin\app\admin\analytics\page.tsx" language="typescriptreact" >
<content>
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Card } from '@mmorpg/ui';
import {
  Users,
  TrendingUp,
  DollarSign,
  Activity,
  Calendar,
  Filter,
} from 'lucide-react';
import {
  LineChart,
  Line,
  BarChart,
  Bar,
  PieChart,
  Pie,
  Cell,
  XAxis,
  YAxis,
  CartesianGrid,
  Tooltip,
  Legend,
  ResponsiveContainer,
} from 'recharts';

interface AnalyticsData {
  date: string;
  activeUsers: number;
  newRegistrations: number;
  revenue: number;
  engagement: number;
}

export default function AnalyticsPage() {
  const [dateRange, setDateRange] = useState('30d');

  // Mock data - in production, fetch from API
  const dailyActiveUsers: AnalyticsData[] = [
    { date: 'May 1', activeUsers: 2400, newRegistrations: 240, revenue: 24000, engagement: 65 },
    { date: 'May 5', activeUsers: 3210, newRegistrations: 321, revenue: 32100, engagement: 72 },
    { date: 'May 10', activeUsers: 2290, newRegistrations: 229, revenue: 22900, engagement: 68 },
    { date: 'May 15', activeUsers: 2000, newRegistrations: 200, revenue: 20000, engagement: 70 },
    { date: 'May 16', activeUsers: 2181, newRegistrations: 218, revenue: 21810, engagement: 75 },
  ];

  const registrationTrends = [
    { name: 'Web', value: 45, fill: '#7C3AED' },
    { name: 'Discord OAuth', value: 30, fill: '#06B6D4' },
    { name: 'Google OAuth', value: 25, fill: '#A855F7' },
  ];

  const engagementMetrics = [
    { metric: 'Marketplace Transactions', value: 1234, change: '+12%' },
    { metric: 'Guild Wars Completed', value: 89, change: '+5%' },
    { metric: 'Forum Posts', value: 5678, change: '+23%' },
    { metric: 'Wiki Edits', value: 234, change: '+8%' },
    { metric: 'Chat Messages', value: 45678, change: '+34%' },
    { metric: 'Screenshots Uploaded', value: 567, change: '+15%' },
  ];

  const revenueBreakdown = [
    { source: 'Premium Subscriptions', amount: 45000, percentage: 45 },
    { source: 'Battle Pass', amount: 30000, percentage: 30 },
    { source: 'Cosmetics', amount: 20000, percentage: 20 },
    { source: 'Other', amount: 5000, percentage: 5 },
  ];

  const topCharacters = [
    { name: 'ShadowKnight', level: 150, class: 'Warrior', playtime: '2,450h' },
    { name: 'MysticMage', level: 148, class: 'Mage', playtime: '2,380h' },
    { name: 'SwiftArcher', level: 145, class: 'Archer', playtime: '2,210h' },
    { name: 'HolyPriest', level: 142, class: 'Priest', playtime: '2,100h' },
    { name: 'SilentAssassin', level: 140, class: 'Assassin', playtime: '1,980h' },
  ];

  const summaryStats = [
    {
      label: 'Total Active Users',
      value: '12,450',
      change: '+8.2%',
      icon: Users,
      color: 'text-[#7C3AED]',
    },
    {
      label: 'New Registrations',
      value: '1,234',
      change: '+15.3%',
      icon: TrendingUp,
      color: 'text-[#06B6D4]',
    },
    {
      label: 'Total Revenue',
      value: '$125,450',
      change: '+22.1%',
      icon: DollarSign,
      color: 'text-green-400',
    },
    {
      label: 'Avg. Engagement',
      value: '72%',
      change: '+5.4%',
      icon: Activity,
      color: 'text-[#A855F7]',
    },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="p-4 md:p-6 space-y-4 md:space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4">
        <div>
          <h1 className="font-heading text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-2">
            Analytics Dashboard
          </h1>
          <p className="text-sm md:text-base text-[#9CA3AF]">
            Detailed analytics on user engagement, revenue, and platform metrics.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Filter className="w-4 md:w-5 h-4 md:h-5 text-[#9CA3AF]" />
          <select
            value={dateRange}
            onChange={(e) => setDateRange(e.target.value)}
            className="px-3 md:px-4 py-2 bg-[#111111] border border-[#7C3AED]/20 rounded-lg text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-[#7C3AED] text-sm md:text-base min-h-[44px]"
          >
            <option value="7d">Last 7 days</option>
            <option value="30d">Last 30 days</option>
            <option value="90d">Last 90 days</option>
            <option value="1y">Last year</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Summary Stats */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 md:gap-4">
        {summaryStats.map((stat) => {
          const Icon = stat.icon;
          return (
            <Card key={stat.label} className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                <span className="text-[#9CA3AF] text-sm font-medium">{stat.label}</span>
                <Icon className={`w-5 h-5 ${stat.color}`} />
              </div>
              <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-1">{stat.value}</div>
              <p className={`text-xs font-medium ${stat.color}`}>{stat.change} from last period</p>
            </Card>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      {/* Charts */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4 md:gap-6">
        {/* Daily Active Users */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4">Daily Active Users</h3>
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
            <LineChart data={dailyActiveUsers}>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#7C3AED/20" />
              <XAxis dataKey="date" stroke="#9CA3AF" />
              <YAxis stroke="#9CA3AF" />
              <Tooltip
                contentStyle={{
                  backgroundColor: '#111111',
                  border: '1px solid #7C3AED/20',
                  borderRadius: '8px',
                }}
                labelStyle={{ color: '#fff' }}
              />
              <Legend />
              <Line
                type="monotone"
                dataKey="activeUsers"
                stroke="#7C3AED"
                strokeWidth={2}
                dot={{ fill: '#7C3AED', r: 4 }}
                name="Active Users"
              />
            </LineChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </Card>

        {/* Registration Trends */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4">Registration Sources</h3>
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
            <PieChart>
              <Pie
                data={registrationTrends}
                cx="50%"
                cy="50%"
                labelLine={false}
                label={({ name, value }) => `${name}: ${value}%`}
                outerRadius={80}
                fill="#8884d8"
                dataKey="value"
              >
                {registrationTrends.map((entry, index) => (
                  <Cell key={`cell-${index}`} fill={entry.fill} />
                ))}
              </Pie>
              <Tooltip
                contentStyle={{
                  backgroundColor: '#111111',
                  border: '1px solid #7C3AED/20',
                  borderRadius: '8px',
                }}
                labelStyle={{ color: '#fff' }}
              />
            </PieChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </Card>

        {/* Revenue Trends */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4">Revenue Trends</h3>
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
            <BarChart data={dailyActiveUsers}>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#7C3AED/20" />
              <XAxis dataKey="date" stroke="#9CA3AF" />
              <YAxis stroke="#9CA3AF" />
              <Tooltip
                contentStyle={{
                  backgroundColor: '#111111',
                  border: '1px solid #7C3AED/20',
                  borderRadius: '8px',
                }}
                labelStyle={{ color: '#fff' }}
              />
              <Bar dataKey="revenue" fill="#A855F7" name="Revenue ($)" />
            </BarChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </Card>

        {/* Engagement Metrics */}
        <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
          <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4">Engagement Metrics</h3>
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
            <LineChart data={dailyActiveUsers}>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#7C3AED/20" />
              <XAxis dataKey="date" stroke="#9CA3AF" />
              <YAxis stroke="#9CA3AF" />
              <Tooltip
                contentStyle={{
                  backgroundColor: '#111111',
                  border: '1px solid #7C3AED/20',
                  borderRadius: '8px',
                }}
                labelStyle={{ color: '#fff' }}
              />
              <Legend />
              <Line
                type="monotone"
                dataKey="engagement"
                stroke="#06B6D4"
                strokeWidth={2}
                dot={{ fill: '#06B6D4', r: 4 }}
                name="Engagement %"
              />
            </LineChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </Card>
      </div>

      {/* Engagement Activities */}
      <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
        <h3 className="font-heading text-base md:text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4">Engagement Activities</h3>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-3 md:gap-4">
          {engagementMetrics.map((metric) => (
            <div key={metric.metric} className="p-3 bg-[#060606] rounded-lg">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                <span className="text-[#9CA3AF] text-sm">{metric.metric}</span>
                <span className="text-green-400 text-xs font-medium">{metric.change}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{metric.value.toLocaleString()}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </Card>

      {/* Revenue Breakdown */}
      <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
        <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4">Revenue Breakdown</h3>
        <div className="space-y-3">
          {revenueBreakdown.map((item) => (
            <div key={item.source} className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div className="flex-1">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                  <span className="text-white font-medium">{item.source}</span>
                  <span className="text-[#9CA3AF] text-sm">${item.amount.toLocaleString()}</span>
                </div>
                <div className="w-full bg-[#060606] rounded-full h-2">
                  <div
                    className="bg-gradient-to-r from-[#7C3AED] to-[#A855F7] h-2 rounded-full"
                    style={{ width: `${item.percentage}%` }}
                  />
                </div>
              </div>
              <span className="ml-4 text-[#7C3AED] font-medium">{item.percentage}%</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </Card>

      {/* Top Characters */}
      <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
        <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4">Top Characters by Playtime</h3>
        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
          <table className="w-full text-sm">
            <thead>
              <tr className="border-b border-[#7C3AED]/20">
                <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium">Character</th>
                <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium">Level</th>
                <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium">Class</th>
                <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium">Playtime</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {topCharacters.map((char, idx) => (
                <tr key={idx} className="border-b border-[#7C3AED]/10 hover:bg-[#060606] transition-colors">
                  <td className="py-3 px-4 text-white font-medium">{char.name}</td>
                  <td className="py-3 px-4 text-[#7C3AED]">{char.level}</td>
                  <td className="py-3 px-4 text-[#9CA3AF]">{char.class}</td>
                  <td className="py-3 px-4 text-[#9CA3AF]">{char.playtime}</td>
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

</content>
</file>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-WEB-SEAL-ONLINE\apps\admin\app\admin\audit-logs\page.tsx" language="typescriptreact" >
<content>
'use client';

import { AuditLogViewer } from '@/components/admin/audit-log-viewer';

export default function AuditLogsPage() {
  return (
    <div className="p-4 md:p-6 space-y-4 md:space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div>
        <h1 className="font-heading text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-2">
          Audit Logs
        </h1>
        <p className="text-sm md:text-base text-[#9CA3AF]">
          View all administrative actions with detailed information about changes made to the platform.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Audit Log Viewer */}
      <AuditLogViewer />
    </div>
  );
}
