<file name="f:\AUDIRA-WEB-SEAL-ONLINE\apps\admin\components\admin\audit-log-viewer.tsx" language="typescriptreact" >
<content>
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Card, Input } from '@mmorpg/ui';
import { Search, Filter, Download, Eye } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';

interface AuditLog {
  id: string;
  adminId: string;
  adminName: string;
  actionType: string;
  targetEntity: string;
  targetId: string;
  targetName: string;
  beforeState?: Record<string, any>;
  afterState?: Record<string, any>;
  ipAddress: string;
  createdAt: string;
}

interface AuditLogViewerProps {
  logs?: AuditLog[];
}

const ACTION_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  BAN_USER: 'bg-red-500/20 text-red-400',
  UNBAN_USER: 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400',
  CHANGE_ROLE: 'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400',
  DELETE_LISTING: 'bg-orange-500/20 text-orange-400',
  PUBLISH_ARTICLE: 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-400',
  SCHEDULE_ARTICLE: 'bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-400',
  CREATE_EVENT: 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400',
  EDIT_EVENT: 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400',
  DELETE_EVENT: 'bg-red-500/20 text-red-400',
  MODERATE_POST: 'bg-orange-500/20 text-orange-400',
  ISSUE_WARNING: 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400',
  TRADE_BAN: 'bg-red-500/20 text-red-400',
};

// Mock data
const mockLogs: AuditLog[] = [
  {
    id: '1',
    adminId: 'admin1',
    adminName: 'Admin',
    actionType: 'PUBLISH_ARTICLE',
    targetEntity: 'News',
    targetId: 'news1',
    targetName: 'New Expansion: Dragon Realm Released',
    afterState: { status: 'published', title: 'New Expansion: Dragon Realm Released' },
    ipAddress: '192.168.1.100',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 2 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(),
  },
  {
    id: '2',
    adminId: 'admin1',
    adminName: 'Admin',
    actionType: 'BAN_USER',
    targetEntity: 'User',
    targetId: 'user123',
    targetName: 'ToxicPlayer',
    beforeState: { banned: false },
    afterState: { banned: true, banReason: 'Harassment', banDuration: '30 days' },
    ipAddress: '192.168.1.100',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 4 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(),
  },
  {
    id: '3',
    adminId: 'admin1',
    adminName: 'Admin',
    actionType: 'DELETE_LISTING',
    targetEntity: 'MarketplaceListing',
    targetId: 'listing456',
    targetName: 'Suspicious Item Listing',
    beforeState: { status: 'ACTIVE', price: 50000 },
    afterState: { status: 'DELETED' },
    ipAddress: '192.168.1.100',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 6 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(),
  },
  {
    id: '4',
    adminId: 'admin1',
    adminName: 'Admin',
    actionType: 'CHANGE_ROLE',
    targetEntity: 'User',
    targetId: 'user789',
    targetName: 'NewModerator',
    beforeState: { role: 'PLAYER' },
    afterState: { role: 'MODERATOR' },
    ipAddress: '192.168.1.100',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 8 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(),
  },
  {
    id: '5',
    adminId: 'admin1',
    adminName: 'Admin',
    actionType: 'CREATE_EVENT',
    targetEntity: 'Event',
    targetId: 'event1',
    targetName: 'Spring PvP Tournament',
    afterState: { title: 'Spring PvP Tournament', startDate: '2026-05-20', endDate: '2026-05-27' },
    ipAddress: '192.168.1.100',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 12 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(),
  },
  {
    id: '6',
    adminId: 'admin1',
    adminName: 'Admin',
    actionType: 'MODERATE_POST',
    targetEntity: 'ForumPost',
    targetId: 'post123',
    targetName: 'Inappropriate Forum Post',
    beforeState: { isModerated: false },
    afterState: { isModerated: true },
    ipAddress: '192.168.1.100',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(),
  },
];

export function AuditLogViewer({ logs = mockLogs }: AuditLogViewerProps) {
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [filterAction, setFilterAction] = useState('');
  const [filterEntity, setFilterEntity] = useState('');
  const [selectedLog, setSelectedLog] = useState<AuditLog | null>(null);
  const [showDetails, setShowDetails] = useState(false);

  const uniqueActions = Array.from(new Set(logs.map(log => log.actionType)));
  const uniqueEntities = Array.from(new Set(logs.map(log => log.targetEntity)));

  const filteredLogs = logs.filter(log => {
    const matchesSearch =
      log.adminName.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
      log.targetName.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
      log.targetId.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());

    const matchesAction = !filterAction || log.actionType === filterAction;
    const matchesEntity = !filterEntity || log.targetEntity === filterEntity;

    return matchesSearch && matchesAction && matchesEntity;
  });

  const handleExport = () => {
    const csv = [
      ['Timestamp', 'Admin', 'Action', 'Entity', 'Target', 'IP Address'],
      ...filteredLogs.map(log => [
        new Date(log.createdAt).toLocaleString(),
        log.adminName,
        log.actionType,
        log.targetEntity,
        log.targetName,
        log.ipAddress,
      ]),
    ]
      .map(row => row.map(cell => `"${cell}"`).join(','))
      .join('\n');

    const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv' });
    const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `audit-logs-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.csv`;
    a.click();
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      {/* Filters */}
      <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Search */}
          <div className="relative">
            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-3 w-5 h-5 text-[#9CA3AF]" />
            <Input
              placeholder="Search by admin, target name, or ID..."
              value={searchQuery}
              onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
              className="pl-10 bg-[#060606] border-[#7C3AED]/20 text-white placeholder-[#9CA3AF] min-h-[44px]"
            />
          </div>

          {/* Filter Controls */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-[#9CA3AF] mb-2">
                <Filter className="w-4 h-4 inline mr-2" />
                Action Type
              </label>
              <select
                value={filterAction}
                onChange={(e) => setFilterAction(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-[#060606] border border-[#7C3AED]/20 rounded-lg text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-[#7C3AED] min-h-[44px] text-sm md:text-base"
              >
                <option value="">All Actions</option>
                {uniqueActions.map(action => (
                  <option key={action} value={action}>
                    {action}
                  </option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-[#9CA3AF] mb-2">
                Entity Type
              </label>
              <select
                value={filterEntity}
                onChange={(e) => setFilterEntity(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-[#060606] border border-[#7C3AED]/20 rounded-lg text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-[#7C3AED] min-h-[44px] text-sm md:text-base"
              >
                <option value="">All Entities</option>
                {uniqueEntities.map(entity => (
                  <option key={entity} value={entity}>
                    {entity}
                  </option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>

            <div className="flex items-end">
              <button
                onClick={handleExport}
                className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-[#7C3AED] hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/80 rounded-lg text-white font-medium transition-colors min-h-[44px] text-sm md:text-base"
              >
                <Download className="w-4 h-4" />
                <span className="hidden sm:inline">Export CSV</span>
                <span className="sm:hidden">Export</span>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Card>

      {/* Logs Table */}
      <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4">
        <div className="overflow-x-auto -mx-4 md:mx-0">
          <div className="inline-block min-w-full align-middle">
            <table className="w-full text-sm">
              <thead>
                <tr className="border-b border-[#7C3AED]/20">
                  <th className="text-left py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium text-xs md:text-sm">Timestamp</th>
                  <th className="text-left py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium text-xs md:text-sm hidden sm:table-cell">Admin</th>
                  <th className="text-left py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium text-xs md:text-sm">Action</th>
                  <th className="text-left py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium text-xs md:text-sm hidden md:table-cell">Entity</th>
                  <th className="text-left py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium text-xs md:text-sm hidden lg:table-cell">Target</th>
                  <th className="text-left py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium text-xs md:text-sm hidden xl:table-cell">IP Address</th>
                  <th className="text-center py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium text-xs md:text-sm">Details</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {filteredLogs.length === 0 ? (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan={7} className="py-8 px-4 text-center text-[#9CA3AF] text-sm">
                      No audit logs found matching your filters.
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ) : (
                  filteredLogs.map((log) => (
                    <tr
                      key={log.id}
                      className="border-b border-[#7C3AED]/10 hover:bg-[#060606] transition-colors"
                    >
                      <td className="py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] text-xs">
                        <div className="hidden md:block">
                          {new Date(log.createdAt).toLocaleString()}
                          <br />
                          <span className="text-[#7C3AED]">
                            {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(log.createdAt), { addSuffix: true })}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="md:hidden">
                          <span className="text-[#7C3AED]">
                            {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(log.createdAt), { addSuffix: true })}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-white font-medium text-xs md:text-sm hidden sm:table-cell">
                        {log.adminName}
                      </td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-2 md:px-4">
                        <span
                          className={`px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium ${
                            ACTION_COLORS[log.actionType] || 'bg-[#7C3AED]/20 text-[#7C3AED]'
                          }`}
                        >
                          <span className="hidden md:inline">{log.actionType}</span>
                          <span className="md:hidden">{log.actionType.split('_')[0]}</span>
                        </span>
                      </td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] text-xs md:text-sm hidden md:table-cell">
                        {log.targetEntity}
                      </td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-white text-xs md:text-sm hidden lg:table-cell">
                        <div className="truncate max-w-xs">{log.targetName}</div>
                        <div className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF]">{log.targetId}</div>
                      </td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-[#9CA3AF] text-xs hidden xl:table-cell">
                        {log.ipAddress}
                      </td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-2 md:px-4 text-center">
                        <button
                          onClick={() => {
                            setSelectedLog(log);
                            setShowDetails(true);
                          }}
                          className="p-2 hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/20 rounded-lg transition-colors text-[#7C3AED] min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] inline-flex items-center justify-center"
                          title="View details"
                        >
                          <Eye className="w-4 h-4" />
                        </button>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  ))
                )}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Card>

      {/* Details Modal */}
      {showDetails && selectedLog && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4">
          <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4 md:p-6 max-w-2xl w-full max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
              <h3 className="font-heading text-xl font-bold text-white">Audit Log Details</h3>
              <button
                onClick={() => setShowDetails(false)}
                className="text-[#9CA3AF] hover:text-white"
              >
                ✕
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-4">
              {/* Basic Info */}
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <label className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium">Admin</label>
                  <p className="text-white font-medium">{selectedLog.adminName}</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium">Action</label>
                  <p className="text-white font-medium">{selectedLog.actionType}</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium">Entity</label>
                  <p className="text-white font-medium">{selectedLog.targetEntity}</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium">Timestamp</label>
                  <p className="text-white font-medium">
                    {new Date(selectedLog.createdAt).toLocaleString()}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Target Info */}
              <div>
                <label className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium">Target</label>
                <p className="text-white font-medium">{selectedLog.targetName}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF]">ID: {selectedLog.targetId}</p>
              </div>

              {/* IP Address */}
              <div>
                <label className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium">IP Address</label>
                <p className="text-white font-medium">{selectedLog.ipAddress}</p>
              </div>

              {/* Before/After State */}
              {(selectedLog.beforeState || selectedLog.afterState) && (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                  {selectedLog.beforeState && (
                    <div>
                      <label className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium">Before State</label>
                      <pre className="bg-[#060606] p-2 rounded text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] overflow-auto max-h-32">
                        {JSON.stringify(selectedLog.beforeState, null, 2)}
                      </pre>
                    </div>
                  )}
                  {selectedLog.afterState && (
                    <div>
                      <label className="text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium">After State</label>
                      <pre className="bg-[#060606] p-2 rounded text-xs text-[#9CA3AF] overflow-auto max-h-32">
                        {JSON.stringify(selectedLog.afterState, null, 2)}
                      </pre>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            <div className="mt-6 flex justify-end">
              <button
                onClick={() => setShowDetails(false)}
                className="px-4 py-2 bg-[#7C3AED] hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/80 rounded-lg text-white font-medium transition-colors"
              >
                Close
              </button>
            </div>
          </Card>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

</content>
</file>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-WEB-SEAL-ONLINE\apps\admin\components\admin\cms\news-article-editor.tsx" language="typescriptreact" >
<content>
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Card, Button, Input } from '@mmorpg/ui';
import { X, Save, Calendar, Clock } from 'lucide-react';

interface Article {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  category: string;
  content?: string;
  status: 'draft' | 'scheduled' | 'published';
  publishedAt?: string;
  scheduledAt?: string;
  author: string;
  createdAt: string;
  thumbnail?: string;
}

interface NewsArticleEditorProps {
  article?: Article | null;
  onSave: (article: Partial<Article>) => void;
  onCancel: () => void;
}

const CATEGORIES = ['UPDATE', 'MAINTENANCE', 'EVENT', 'COMMUNITY', 'PATCH_NOTES'];

export function NewsArticleEditor({ article, onSave, onCancel }: NewsArticleEditorProps) {
  const [title, setTitle] = useState(article?.title || '');
  const [category, setCategory] = useState(article?.category || 'UPDATE');
  const [content, setContent] = useState('');
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<'draft' | 'scheduled' | 'published'>(
    article?.status || 'draft'
  );
  const [scheduledAt, setScheduledAt] = useState(article?.scheduledAt || '');
  const [thumbnail, setThumbnail] = useState(article?.thumbnail || '');

  const handleSave = () => {
    if (!title.trim()) {
      alert('Please enter a title');
      return;
    }

    const newArticle: Partial<Article> = {
      title,
      category,
      content,
      status,
      author: 'Admin',
      thumbnail,
    };

    if (status === 'scheduled' && scheduledAt) {
      newArticle.scheduledAt = scheduledAt;
    } else if (status === 'published') {
      newArticle.publishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    }

    onSave(newArticle);
  };

  return (
    <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-6 space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <h2 className="font-heading text-2xl font-bold text-white">
          {article ? 'Edit Article' : 'Create New Article'}
        </h2>
        <button
          onClick={onCancel}
          className="p-2 hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/10 rounded-lg transition-colors"
        >
          <X className="w-5 h-5 text-[#9CA3AF]" />
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Form */}
      <div className="space-y-4">
        {/* Title */}
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-white mb-2">Title</label>
          <Input
            value={title}
            onChange={(e) => setTitle(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="Article title"
            className="bg-[#060606] border-[#7C3AED]/20 text-white placeholder-[#9CA3AF]"
          />
        </div>

        {/* Category */}
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-white mb-2">Category</label>
          <select
            value={category}
            onChange={(e) => setCategory(e.target.value)}
            className="w-full px-4 py-2 bg-[#060606] border border-[#7C3AED]/20 rounded-lg text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-[#7C3AED]"
          >
            {CATEGORIES.map((cat) => (
              <option key={cat} value={cat}>
                {cat}
              </option>
            ))}
          </select>
        </div>

        {/* Thumbnail URL */}
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-white mb-2">Thumbnail URL</label>
          <Input
            value={thumbnail}
            onChange={(e) => setThumbnail(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="https://example.com/image.jpg"
            className="bg-[#060606] border-[#7C3AED]/20 text-white placeholder-[#9CA3AF]"
          />
        </div>

        {/* Content */}
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-white mb-2">Content</label>
          <textarea
            value={content}
            onChange={(e) => setContent(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="Article content (supports markdown)"
            rows={8}
            className="w-full px-4 py-2 bg-[#060606] border border-[#7C3AED]/20 rounded-lg text-white placeholder-[#9CA3AF] focus:outline-none focus:border-[#7C3AED] font-mono text-sm"
          />
        </div>

        {/* Status */}
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-white mb-2">Status</label>
          <div className="flex gap-3">
            {(['draft', 'scheduled', 'published'] as const).map((s) => (
              <button
                key={s}
                onClick={() => setStatus(s)}
                className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors ${
                  status === s
                    ? 'bg-[#7C3AED] text-white'
                    : 'bg-[#060606] border border-[#7C3AED]/20 text-[#9CA3AF] hover:text-white'
                }`}
              >
                {s.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + s.slice(1)}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Scheduled Date/Time */}
        {status === 'scheduled' && (
          <div>
            <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-white mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Calendar className="w-4 h-4" />
              Schedule Publication
            </label>
            <Input
              type="datetime-local"
              value={scheduledAt}
              onChange={(e) => setScheduledAt(e.target.value)}
              className="bg-[#060606] border-[#7C3AED]/20 text-white"
            />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Actions */}
      <div className="flex gap-3 justify-end pt-4 border-t border-[#7C3AED]/20">
        <Button
          onClick={onCancel}
          className="bg-[#060606] border border-[#7C3AED]/20 text-white hover:bg-[#111111]"
        >
          Cancel
        </Button>
        <Button
          onClick={handleSave}
          className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-[#7C3AED] hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/80"
        >
          <Save className="w-4 h-4" />
          {article ? 'Update Article' : 'Create Article'}
        </Button>
      </div>
    </Card>
  );
}

</content>
</file>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-WEB-SEAL-ONLINE\apps\admin\components\admin\cms\event-manager.tsx" language="typescriptreact" >
<content>
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Card, Button, Input } from '@mmorpg/ui';
import { X, Save, Calendar } from 'lucide-react';

interface Event {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  description?: string;
  startDate: string;
  endDate: string;
  isActive: boolean;
  rewards?: any;
  createdAt: string;
}

interface EventManagerProps {
  event?: Event | null;
  onSave: (event: Partial<Event>) => void;
  onCancel: () => void;
}

export function EventManager({ event, onSave, onCancel }: EventManagerProps) {
  const [title, setTitle] = useState(event?.title || '');
  const [description, setDescription] = useState('');
  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(event?.startDate || '');
  const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState(event?.endDate || '');
  const [isActive, setIsActive] = useState(event?.isActive ?? true);
  const [rewards, setRewards] = useState('');

  const handleSave = () => {
    if (!title.trim()) {
      alert('Please enter an event title');
      return;
    }
    if (!startDate || !endDate) {
      alert('Please select start and end dates');
      return;
    }

    const newEvent: Partial<Event> = {
      title,
      startDate,
      endDate,
      isActive,
      description,
      rewards: rewards ? JSON.parse(rewards) : null,
    };

    onSave(newEvent);
  };

  return (
    <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-6 space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <h2 className="font-heading text-2xl font-bold text-white">
          {event ? 'Edit Event' : 'Create New Event'}
        </h2>
        <button
          onClick={onCancel}
          className="p-2 hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/10 rounded-lg transition-colors"
        >
          <X className="w-5 h-5 text-[#9CA3AF]" />
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Form */}
      <div className="space-y-4">
        {/* Title */}
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-white mb-2">Event Title</label>
          <Input
            value={title}
            onChange={(e) => setTitle(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="Event name"
            className="bg-[#060606] border-[#7C3AED]/20 text-white placeholder-[#9CA3AF]"
          />
        </div>

        {/* Description */}
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-white mb-2">Description</label>
          <textarea
            value={description}
            onChange={(e) => setDescription(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="Event description"
            rows={4}
            className="w-full px-4 py-2 bg-[#060606] border border-[#7C3AED]/20 rounded-lg text-white placeholder-[#9CA3AF] focus:outline-none focus:border-[#7C3AED]"
          />
        </div>

        {/* Start Date */}
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-white mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Calendar className="w-4 h-4" />
            Start Date & Time
          </label>
          <Input
            type="datetime-local"
            value={startDate}
            onChange={(e) => setStartDate(e.target.value)}
            className="bg-[#060606] border-[#7C3AED]/20 text-white"
          />
        </div>

        {/* End Date */}
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-white mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Calendar className="w-4 h-4" />
            End Date & Time
          </label>
          <Input
            type="datetime-local"
            value={endDate}
            onChange={(e) => setEndDate(e.target.value)}
            className="bg-[#060606] border-[#7C3AED]/20 text-white"
          />
        </div>

        {/* Rewards */}
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-white mb-2">Rewards (JSON)</label>
          <textarea
            value={rewards}
            onChange={(e) => setRewards(e.target.value)}
            placeholder='{"gold": 10000, "experience": 50000}'
            rows={3}
            className="w-full px-4 py-2 bg-[#060606] border border-[#7C3AED]/20 rounded-lg text-white placeholder-[#9CA3AF] focus:outline-none focus:border-[#7C3AED] font-mono text-sm"
          />
        </div>

        {/* Active Status */}
        <div>
          <label className="flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer">
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              checked={isActive}
              onChange={(e) => setIsActive(e.target.checked)}
              className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-[#7C3AED]/20 bg-[#060606] accent-[#7C3AED]"
            />
            <span className="text-white font-medium">Event is Active</span>
          </label>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Actions */}
      <div className="flex gap-3 justify-end pt-4 border-t border-[#7C3AED]/20">
        <Button
          onClick={onCancel}
          className="bg-[#060606] border border-[#7C3AED]/20 text-white hover:bg-[#111111]"
        >
          Cancel
        </Button>
        <Button
          onClick={handleSave}
          className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-[#7C3AED] hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/80"
        >
          <Save className="w-4 h-4" />
          {event ? 'Update Event' : 'Create Event'}
        </Button>
      </div>
    </Card>
  );
}

</content>
</file>

<content>
'use client';

import { Card } from '@mmorpg/ui';
import { Edit2, Trash2, Eye, EyeOff, Calendar, Clock } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';

interface Article {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  category: string;
  status: 'draft' | 'scheduled' | 'published';
  publishedAt?: string;
  scheduledAt?: string;
  author: string;
  createdAt: string;
  thumbnail?: string;
}

interface ArticleListProps {
  articles: Article[];
  onEdit: (article: Article) => void;
  onDelete: (id: string) => void;
}

const statusColors = {
  draft: 'bg-[#9CA3AF]/20 text-[#9CA3AF]',
  scheduled: 'bg-[#06B6D4]/20 text-[#06B6D4]',
  published: 'bg-[#7C3AED]/20 text-[#7C3AED]',
};

const categoryColors: Record<string, string> = {
  UPDATE: 'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400',
  MAINTENANCE: 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400',
  EVENT: 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-400',
  COMMUNITY: 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400',
  PATCH_NOTES: 'bg-orange-500/20 text-orange-400',
};

export function ArticleList({ articles, onEdit, onDelete }: ArticleListProps) {
  if (articles.length === 0) {
    return (
      <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-12 text-center">
        <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white mb-2">
          No Articles Found
        </h3>
        <p className="text-[#9CA3AF]">
          Create your first article to get started.
        </p>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      {articles.map((article) => (
        <Card
          key={article.id}
          className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4 hover:border-[#7C3AED]/40 transition-colors"
        >
          <div className="flex gap-4">
            {/* Thumbnail */}
            {article.thumbnail && (
              <div className="w-24 h-24 rounded-lg overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0">
                <img
                  src={article.thumbnail}
                  alt={article.title}
                  className="w-full h-full object-cover"
                />
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Content */}
            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4 mb-2">
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white truncate">
                    {article.title}
                  </h3>
                  <div className="flex gap-2 mt-2 flex-wrap">
                    <span
                      className={`px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium ${
                        categoryColors[article.category] || 'bg-[#7C3AED]/20 text-[#7C3AED]'
                      }`}
                    >
                      {article.category}
                    </span>
                    <span
                      className={`px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium ${
                        statusColors[article.status]
                      }`}
                    >
                      {article.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + article.status.slice(1)}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Actions */}
                <div className="flex gap-2 flex-shrink-0">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => onEdit(article)}
                    className="p-2 hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/20 rounded-lg transition-colors text-[#7C3AED]"
                    title="Edit"
                  >
                    <Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => {
                      if (confirm('Delete this article?')) {
                        onDelete(article.id);
                      }
                    }}
                    className="p-2 hover:bg-red-500/20 rounded-lg transition-colors text-red-400"
                    title="Delete"
                  >
                    <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Meta Info */}
              <div className="flex gap-4 text-xs text-[#9CA3AF]">
                <span>By {article.author}</span>
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
                  Created {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(article.createdAt), { addSuffix: true })}
                </span>
                {article.publishedAt && (
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[#7C3AED]">
                    <Eye className="w-3 h-3" />
                    Published {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(article.publishedAt), { addSuffix: true })}
                  </span>
                )}
                {article.scheduledAt && (
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[#06B6D4]">
                    <Calendar className="w-3 h-3" />
                    Scheduled for {new Date(article.scheduledAt).toLocaleString()}
                  </span>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </Card>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

</content>
</file>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-WEB-SEAL-ONLINE\apps\admin\components\admin\cms\event-list.tsx" language="typescriptreact" >
<content>
'use client';

import { Card } from '@mmorpg/ui';
import { Edit2, Trash2, Calendar, Clock, CheckCircle, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';

interface Event {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  startDate: string;
  endDate: string;
  isActive: boolean;
  createdAt: string;
}

interface EventListProps {
  events: Event[];
  onEdit: (event: Event) => void;
  onDelete: (id: string) => void;
}

export function EventList({ events, onEdit, onDelete }: EventListProps) {
  const getEventStatus = (event: Event) => {
    const now = new Date();
    const start = new Date(event.startDate);
    const end = new Date(event.endDate);

    if (now < start) return 'upcoming';
    if (now > end) return 'ended';
    return 'active';
  };

  if (events.length === 0) {
    return (
      <Card className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-12 text-center">
        <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white mb-2">
          No Events Found
        </h3>
        <p className="text-[#9CA3AF]">
          Create your first event to get started.
        </p>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      {events.map((event) => {
        const status = getEventStatus(event);
        const statusConfig = {
          active: { icon: CheckCircle, color: 'text-green-400', bg: 'bg-green-500/20' },
          upcoming: { icon: Clock, color: 'text-blue-400', bg: 'bg-blue-500/20' },
          ended: { icon: AlertCircle, color: 'text-gray-400', bg: 'bg-gray-500/20' },
        };
        const StatusIcon = statusConfig[status as keyof typeof statusConfig].icon;

        return (
          <Card
            key={event.id}
            className="bg-[#111111] border-2 border-[#7C3AED]/20 p-4 hover:border-[#7C3AED]/40 transition-colors"
          >
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
              {/* Content */}
              <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
                  <h3 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-white truncate">
                    {event.title}
                  </h3>
                  <div
                    className={`flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium ${
                      statusConfig[status as keyof typeof statusConfig].bg
                    } ${statusConfig[status as keyof typeof statusConfig].color}`}
                  >
                    <StatusIcon className="w-3 h-3" />
                    {status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + status.slice(1)}
                  </div>
                  {event.isActive && (
                    <span className="px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-[#7C3AED]/20 text-[#7C3AED]">
                      Enabled
                    </span>
                  )}
                </div>

                {/* Dates */}
                <div className="flex gap-4 text-sm text-[#9CA3AF]">
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    <Calendar className="w-3 h-3" />
                    {new Date(event.startDate).toLocaleDateString()} -{' '}
                    {new Date(event.endDate).toLocaleDateString()}
                  </span>
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
                    Created {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(event.createdAt), { addSuffix: true })}
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Actions */}
              <div className="flex gap-2 flex-shrink-0">
                <button
                  onClick={() => onEdit(event)}
                  className="p-2 hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/20 rounded-lg transition-colors text-[#7C3AED]"
                  title="Edit"
                >
                  <Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => {
                    if (confirm('Delete this event?')) {
                      onDelete(event.id);
                    }
                  }}
                  className="p-2 hover:bg-red-500/20 rounded-lg transition-colors text-red-400"
                  title="Delete"
                >
                  <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </Card>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

</content>
</file>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-WEB-SEAL-ONLINE\.kiro\specs\mmorpg-portal-platform\requirements.md" language="markdown" >
<content>
# Requirements Document

## Introduction

This document defines the requirements for a production-ready MMORPG Portal Platform inspired by Seal Online, featuring a Neo Brutalism Dark futuristic design system. The platform serves as a comprehensive gaming ecosystem including a public-facing landing page, player dashboard, guild management, ranking system, marketplace, wiki, community features, AI assistant, admin panel, and realtime capabilities. The architecture follows a monorepo structure with Next.js frontend, NestJS backend, PostgreSQL database, Redis caching, and Socket.IO realtime communication.

## Glossary

- **Portal**: The main Next.js web application serving the public landing page and authenticated player areas
- **Admin_Panel**: The separate Next.js application for game administrators, moderators, and GMs to manage the platform
- **API_Server**: The NestJS backend application providing REST endpoints for all platform operations
- **Realtime_Service**: The Socket.IO-based service handling live updates, chat, and notifications
- **AI_Service**: The OpenAI-integrated service providing intelligent game assistance and recommendations
- **Auth_System**: The JWT-based authentication and authorization module handling login, registration, and session management
- **Player_Dashboard**: The authenticated area where players manage characters, inventory, achievements, and account settings
- **Guild_System**: The module managing guild creation, membership, rankings, wars, and communication
- **Ranking_Engine**: The Redis-backed realtime ranking computation and display system
- **Marketplace**: The in-game item trading platform with auction house and price tracking
- **Wiki_System**: The database-driven game knowledge base covering monsters, items, skills, maps, and quests
- **Community_Hub**: The social features module including forums, chat, galleries, and recruitment
- **CMS**: The content management system for news, events, and announcements
- **Design_System**: The Neo Brutalism Dark themed UI component library with neon glows, glassmorphism, and brutal borders
- **Notification_Service**: The module delivering realtime and persistent notifications to users
- **Audit_Logger**: The system recording all administrative and security-relevant actions

## Requirements

### Requirement 1: Landing Page Hero Section

**User Story:** As a visitor, I want to see an immersive animated hero section when I arrive at the portal, so that I feel the excitement of the MMORPG world and am motivated to join.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN a visitor loads the landing page, THE Portal SHALL display a full-viewport hero section with animated particle background, game title branding, and call-to-action buttons within 3 seconds of page load
2. THE Portal SHALL render a "Download Launcher" button and a "Register Account" button in the hero section
3. WHEN a visitor hovers over a CTA button, THE Portal SHALL display a neon glow animation effect within 100ms
4. THE Portal SHALL display a live online player count in the hero section updated via WebSocket connection
5. WHILE the hero section is visible, THE Portal SHALL render floating particle effects and animated gradient backgrounds using Framer Motion

### Requirement 2: Landing Page Content Sections

**User Story:** As a visitor, I want to browse game information sections on the landing page, so that I can learn about the game features before registering.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Portal SHALL display the following sections in order: Hero, Download Game, Latest News, Events, Character Classes, Top Rankings, Guild Showcase, Marketplace Preview, Community Section, and Footer
2. WHEN a section scrolls into the viewport, THE Portal SHALL trigger entrance animations using Framer Motion with staggered timing
3. THE Portal SHALL display the latest 6 news articles as cards in the Latest News section with title, thumbnail, date, and category
4. THE Portal SHALL display the top 5 guilds with guild name, emblem, level, and member count in the Guild Showcase section
5. THE Portal SHALL display a preview of 8 marketplace items with item image, name, price, and seller in the Marketplace Preview section
6. THE Portal SHALL display all playable character classes with class artwork, name, description, and primary stats in the Character Classes section
7. THE Portal SHALL render the top 10 players by level in the Top Rankings section with rank, character name, class, and level

### Requirement 3: Design System Implementation

**User Story:** As a developer, I want a consistent Neo Brutalism Dark design system, so that all UI components maintain visual coherence across the platform.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Design_System SHALL use background color #060606, surface color #111111, primary color #7C3AED, secondary color #06B6D4, accent color #A855F7, text color #FFFFFF, and muted color #9CA3AF as the core palette
2. THE Design_System SHALL use Orbitron for headings, Inter for body text, and Exo 2 for UI elements as the typography stack
3. THE Design_System SHALL apply border-radius of 2xl (16px), large brutal borders (2-4px solid), soft neon glow shadows, and glassmorphism backdrop-blur effects to card components
4. THE Design_System SHALL provide responsive breakpoints for mobile (< 768px), tablet (768px-1024px), and desktop (> 1024px) layouts
5. THE Design_System SHALL implement all interactive elements with hover animations, smooth transitions (200-300ms duration), and focus-visible states for accessibility

### Requirement 4: User Authentication

**User Story:** As a visitor, I want to register and log in to the platform securely, so that I can access my player account and game features.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN a visitor submits a registration form with valid email, username, and password, THE Auth_System SHALL create a new user account and send an email verification link within 5 seconds
2. WHEN a user submits valid login credentials, THE Auth_System SHALL issue a JWT access token (15-minute expiry) and a refresh token (7-day expiry)
3. WHEN a user clicks "Login with Discord", THE Auth_System SHALL initiate OAuth2 flow with Discord and create or link the user account upon successful authorization
4. WHEN a user clicks "Login with Google", THE Auth_System SHALL initiate OAuth2 flow with Google and create or link the user account upon successful authorization
5. IF a user submits invalid credentials 5 times within 10 minutes, THEN THE Auth_System SHALL lock the account for 30 minutes and notify the user via email
6. WHEN a JWT access token expires, THE Auth_System SHALL use the refresh token to issue a new access token without requiring re-authentication
7. THE Auth_System SHALL enforce role-based access control with roles: Player, Moderator, GM, and Admin
8. WHEN a user requests password reset, THE Auth_System SHALL send a time-limited reset link (valid for 1 hour) to the registered email address

### Requirement 5: Player Dashboard

**User Story:** As a player, I want a comprehensive dashboard to manage my game account, so that I can track my progress and manage my characters.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN an authenticated player navigates to the dashboard, THE Player_Dashboard SHALL display character list, account stats summary, daily missions, and recent activity
2. THE Player_Dashboard SHALL display each character with name, class, level, equipment preview, and last login timestamp
3. WHEN a player selects a character, THE Player_Dashboard SHALL display detailed stats including HP, MP, attack, defense, speed, and all equipped items
4. THE Player_Dashboard SHALL display the player's inventory with item icons, names, quantities, and rarity indicators
5. THE Player_Dashboard SHALL display achievement progress with earned badges, completion percentage, and reward status
6. THE Player_Dashboard SHALL display daily missions with objectives, progress bars, time remaining, and reward previews
7. WHEN a player has premium membership, THE Player_Dashboard SHALL display membership tier, expiration date, and exclusive benefits
8. THE Player_Dashboard SHALL display wallet balance, transaction history, and top-up options
9. THE Player_Dashboard SHALL display a mailbox with unread count, message previews, and attachment indicators
10. THE Player_Dashboard SHALL display login history with timestamps, IP addresses (masked), and device information

### Requirement 6: Guild Management System

**User Story:** As a player, I want to create and manage guilds, so that I can collaborate with other players and compete in guild activities.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN a player meets the guild creation requirements (level 30+, 100,000 gold), THE Guild_System SHALL allow creation of a new guild with name, emblem, description, and recruitment settings
2. THE Guild_System SHALL display guild profile with name, emblem, level, member count, ranking position, creation date, and guild description
3. WHEN a guild leader invites a player, THE Guild_System SHALL send a guild invitation notification that expires after 48 hours
4. THE Guild_System SHALL support guild roles: Leader, Vice Leader, Elder, Member, and Recruit with configurable permissions
5. THE Guild_System SHALL display guild rankings based on combined member levels, PvP wins, and guild war victories
6. WHEN a guild leader initiates a guild war, THE Guild_System SHALL create a war instance with opposing guild, duration, objectives, and scoring rules
7. THE Guild_System SHALL provide guild announcements visible to all members with pinning and priority levels
8. THE Guild_System SHALL maintain a guild storage system with deposit/withdraw permissions based on guild role
9. THE Guild_System SHALL log all guild activities including member joins, leaves, promotions, storage transactions, and war results

### Requirement 7: Ranking System

**User Story:** As a player, I want to view realtime rankings, so that I can track my competitive standing and compare with other players.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Ranking_Engine SHALL compute and display rankings for: Top Level, Top PvP, Top Guild, Richest Player, Top Achievement, and Arena categories
2. WHEN a ranking-relevant event occurs (level up, PvP win, gold change), THE Ranking_Engine SHALL update the affected rankings within 5 seconds using Redis sorted sets
3. THE Ranking_Engine SHALL broadcast ranking changes to connected clients via WebSocket within 2 seconds of computation
4. THE Portal SHALL display ranking tables with rank position, player/guild name, relevant score, class icon, and trend indicator (up/down/stable)
5. WHEN a player views rankings, THE Portal SHALL highlight the current player's position in the ranking table
6. THE Ranking_Engine SHALL maintain historical ranking snapshots on a daily basis for trend analysis

### Requirement 8: Marketplace

**User Story:** As a player, I want to buy and sell items through a marketplace, so that I can trade with other players and find equipment I need.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN a player lists an item for sale, THE Marketplace SHALL create a listing with item details, asking price, duration (24h/48h/72h), and seller information
2. WHEN a player lists an item for auction, THE Marketplace SHALL create an auction with starting price, minimum bid increment, and end time
3. WHEN a buyer purchases a listed item, THE Marketplace SHALL transfer the item to the buyer's inventory and gold to the seller's wallet minus a 5% transaction fee
4. THE Marketplace SHALL provide search functionality with filters for item category, rarity, level requirement, price range, and item stats
5. THE Marketplace SHALL display price history charts for items showing average price over 7-day, 30-day, and 90-day periods
6. WHEN a marketplace listing expires without sale, THE Marketplace SHALL return the item to the seller's inventory and notify the seller
7. THE Marketplace SHALL broadcast new listings and completed sales to connected clients via WebSocket for realtime market updates
8. IF a buyer has insufficient gold for a purchase, THEN THE Marketplace SHALL reject the transaction and display an insufficient funds message

### Requirement 9: Wiki System

**User Story:** As a player, I want to access a comprehensive game wiki, so that I can look up information about monsters, items, skills, and quests.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Wiki_System SHALL provide searchable databases for: Monsters, Items, Equipment, Skills, NPCs, Maps, and Quests
2. WHEN a user searches the wiki, THE Wiki_System SHALL return relevant results within 500ms using full-text search with relevance scoring
3. THE Wiki_System SHALL display monster entries with name, image, level, HP, element, drops table, spawn locations, and weaknesses
4. THE Wiki_System SHALL display item entries with name, image, description, stats, crafting recipe, drop sources, and market price reference
5. THE Wiki_System SHALL display quest entries with name, NPC giver, requirements, objectives, rewards, and walkthrough steps
6. THE Wiki_System SHALL support admin-editable content with version history and rollback capability

### Requirement 10: Community Features

**User Story:** As a player, I want to interact with the game community, so that I can socialize, share content, and find groups.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Community_Hub SHALL provide a forum system with categories, threads, posts, reactions, and moderation tools
2. WHEN a user sends a message in global chat, THE Realtime_Service SHALL deliver the message to all connected clients within 500ms
3. WHEN a user sends a message in guild chat, THE Realtime_Service SHALL deliver the message only to online guild members within 500ms
4. THE Community_Hub SHALL display a realtime online player count updated every 30 seconds
5. THE Community_Hub SHALL provide a screenshot gallery where players can upload, tag, and comment on game screenshots
6. THE Community_Hub SHALL provide a recruitment board where guilds can post recruitment listings with requirements and contact information
7. IF a user posts content that violates community guidelines, THEN THE Community_Hub SHALL allow moderators to remove the content and issue warnings or bans

### Requirement 11: AI Assistant

**User Story:** As a player, I want AI-powered game assistance, so that I can get personalized recommendations and help with game content.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN a player asks the AI assistant a question, THE AI_Service SHALL respond with contextually relevant game advice within 5 seconds using OpenAI API
2. THE AI_Service SHALL provide farming guides recommending optimal monster locations based on player level, class, and equipment
3. THE AI_Service SHALL provide build recommendations suggesting skill allocations and equipment based on player class and playstyle preference
4. THE AI_Service SHALL provide market analysis summarizing price trends and suggesting optimal buy/sell timing for specified items
5. THE AI_Service SHALL maintain conversation context within a session for follow-up questions
6. THE AI_Service SHALL use RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) architecture to ground responses in the game's wiki database

### Requirement 12: Admin Panel

**User Story:** As an administrator, I want a comprehensive admin panel, so that I can manage users, content, and monitor the platform.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN an admin logs into the Admin_Panel, THE Admin_Panel SHALL display a dashboard with active users, server status, recent reports, and key metrics
2. THE Admin_Panel SHALL provide user management with search, view profile, edit roles, ban/unban, and view activity history
3. WHEN an admin bans a user, THE Admin_Panel SHALL record the ban reason, duration, issuing admin, and notify the banned user
4. THE Admin_Panel SHALL provide a CMS for creating, editing, scheduling, and publishing news articles and event announcements
5. THE Admin_Panel SHALL provide marketplace moderation tools for reviewing flagged listings, removing items, and issuing trade bans
6. THE Admin_Panel SHALL display realtime server monitoring with CPU usage, memory usage, active connections, and API response times
7. THE Audit_Logger SHALL record all admin actions with timestamp, admin identity, action type, target entity, and before/after state
8. THE Admin_Panel SHALL provide analytics dashboards showing daily active users, registration trends, revenue, and engagement metrics

### Requirement 13: Realtime Communication

**User Story:** As a player, I want realtime updates across the platform, so that I can receive instant notifications and see live data changes.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN a user connects to the platform, THE Realtime_Service SHALL establish a WebSocket connection with automatic reconnection on disconnect (max 5 retries with exponential backoff)
2. THE Realtime_Service SHALL support namespaced channels for: rankings, chat, marketplace, notifications, and guild events
3. WHEN a notification is generated for a user, THE Notification_Service SHALL deliver it via WebSocket if the user is online, and persist it for retrieval when the user next connects
4. THE Realtime_Service SHALL authenticate WebSocket connections using JWT tokens and reject unauthorized connection attempts
5. THE Realtime_Service SHALL handle graceful degradation by queuing messages during brief disconnections and delivering them upon reconnection within 30 seconds

### Requirement 14: API Architecture

**User Story:** As a developer, I want a well-structured enterprise API, so that all platform features are accessible through consistent, documented endpoints.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE API_Server SHALL implement RESTful endpoints with consistent response format including status code, data payload, error messages, and pagination metadata
2. THE API_Server SHALL validate all incoming request bodies using DTO classes with Zod schema validation and return descriptive validation errors
3. THE API_Server SHALL generate OpenAPI/Swagger documentation accessible at the /api/docs endpoint
4. THE API_Server SHALL implement rate limiting of 100 requests per minute per authenticated user and 30 requests per minute per unauthenticated IP
5. IF an API request fails due to server error, THEN THE API_Server SHALL return a standardized error response with error code, message, and correlation ID for debugging
6. THE API_Server SHALL implement request/response logging with correlation IDs for distributed tracing

### Requirement 15: Security

**User Story:** As a platform operator, I want comprehensive security measures, so that user data and platform integrity are protected.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE API_Server SHALL implement Helmet middleware for HTTP security headers including Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, and Strict-Transport-Security
2. THE API_Server SHALL sanitize all user inputs to prevent XSS attacks by escaping HTML entities and validating content types
3. THE API_Server SHALL use parameterized queries through Prisma ORM to prevent SQL injection attacks
4. THE API_Server SHALL implement CSRF protection for all state-changing endpoints using double-submit cookie pattern
5. THE Auth_System SHALL hash all passwords using bcrypt with a minimum cost factor of 12
6. THE API_Server SHALL validate all environment variables at startup using Zod schemas and fail fast with descriptive errors for missing configuration

### Requirement 16: Performance and SEO

**User Story:** As a platform operator, I want optimized performance and search engine visibility, so that the platform loads quickly and ranks well in search results.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Portal SHALL achieve a Lighthouse performance score of 90 or above on desktop through lazy loading, code splitting, and image optimization
2. THE Portal SHALL implement Next.js server-side rendering for all public pages to ensure search engine crawlability
3. THE Portal SHALL generate OpenGraph meta tags, Twitter card meta tags, and structured data (JSON-LD) for all public pages
4. THE Portal SHALL generate a dynamic sitemap.xml including all public pages, news articles, and wiki entries
5. THE API_Server SHALL implement Redis caching for frequently accessed data with appropriate TTL values (rankings: 5s, wiki: 1h, news: 5m)
6. THE Portal SHALL optimize all images using Next.js Image component with WebP format and responsive srcset attributes

### Requirement 17: Database Architecture

**User Story:** As a developer, I want a well-designed database schema, so that all platform data is stored efficiently with proper relationships and constraints.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE API_Server SHALL use Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL and define models for: User, Character, Guild, GuildMember, Item, MarketplaceListing, Inventory, Ranking, News, Event, Achievement, Quest, ForumPost, ChatMessage, Notification, and AuditLog
2. THE API_Server SHALL implement database migrations using Prisma Migrate for all schema changes with rollback capability
3. THE API_Server SHALL enforce referential integrity through foreign key constraints on all related models
4. THE API_Server SHALL implement soft-delete for User, Character, Guild, and MarketplaceListing models to preserve data history
5. THE API_Server SHALL index frequently queried columns including user email, character name, item name, and ranking scores for query performance

### Requirement 18: DevOps and Deployment

**User Story:** As a platform operator, I want containerized deployment with CI/CD, so that the platform can be reliably deployed and scaled.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Platform SHALL provide Docker Compose configuration to run all services (web, admin, api, realtime, ai-service, postgres, redis) with a single command
2. THE Platform SHALL provide Dockerfiles for each application with multi-stage builds optimizing for production image size
3. THE Platform SHALL provide GitHub Actions workflows for: linting, testing, building, and deploying on push to main branch
4. THE Platform SHALL provide Nginx configuration as reverse proxy with SSL termination, gzip compression, and static asset caching
5. THE Platform SHALL provide environment variable templates (.env.example) for all services documenting required configuration

### Requirement 19: Mobile Responsiveness

**User Story:** As a mobile player, I want the platform to work seamlessly on mobile devices, so that I can access all features from my phone or tablet.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Portal SHALL render all pages with mobile-first responsive layouts that adapt to screen widths from 320px to 2560px
2. WHEN viewed on mobile (< 768px), THE Portal SHALL collapse navigation into a hamburger menu with slide-out drawer
3. WHEN viewed on mobile, THE Portal SHALL stack card layouts vertically and adjust font sizes for readability
4. THE Portal SHALL support touch gestures for carousel components, swipeable panels, and pull-to-refresh on data lists
5. THE Portal SHALL maintain all interactive functionality (forms, modals, dropdowns) with touch-friendly tap targets of minimum 44x44px

### Requirement 20: Animations and Motion Design

**User Story:** As a visitor, I want smooth premium animations throughout the platform, so that the experience feels like a AAA gaming portal.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Portal SHALL implement page transition animations using Framer Motion with fade and slide effects lasting 300-500ms
2. THE Portal SHALL implement scroll-triggered entrance animations for content sections with staggered delays of 50-100ms between elements
3. THE Portal SHALL implement hover effects on all interactive cards with scale transform (1.02-1.05), glow intensification, and border color transitions
4. THE Portal SHALL implement loading skeleton animations with shimmer effects matching the Neo Brutalism Dark color palette
5. THE Portal SHALL implement floating particle effects on the hero section and key landing page areas using canvas or CSS animations
6. WHILE animations are playing, THE Portal SHALL maintain 60fps rendering performance and respect the prefers-reduced-motion media query by disabling non-essential animations

</content>
</file>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-WEB-SEAL-ONLINE\apps\admin\app\admin-layout.tsx" language="typescriptreact" >
<content>
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { usePathname } from 'next/navigation';
import { Button } from '@mmorpg/ui';
import {
  LayoutDashboard,
  Users,
  FileText,
  Shield,
  Activity,
  BarChart3,
  Menu,
  X,
  LogOut,
} from 'lucide-react';

interface AdminLayoutProps {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}

const navigationItems = [
  {
    label: 'Dashboard',
    href: '/admin',
    icon: LayoutDashboard,
  },
  {
    label: 'Users',
    href: '/admin/users',
    icon: Users,
  },
  {
    label: 'CMS',
    href: '/admin/cms',
    icon: FileText,
  },
  {
    label: 'Moderation',
    href: '/admin/moderation',
    icon: Shield,
  },
  {
    label: 'Monitoring',
    href: '/admin/monitoring',
    icon: Activity,
  },
  {
    label: 'Analytics',
    href: '/admin/analytics',
    icon: BarChart3,
  },
  {
    label: 'Audit Logs',
    href: '/admin/audit-logs',
    icon: FileText,
  },
];

export function AdminLayout({ children }: AdminLayoutProps) {
  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(false); // Default closed on mobile
  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false);
  const pathname = usePathname();

  // Detect mobile screen size
  useEffect(() => {
    const checkMobile = () => {
      const mobile = window.innerWidth < 768;
      setIsMobile(mobile);
      // On desktop, keep sidebar open by default
      if (!mobile && !sidebarOpen) {
        setSidebarOpen(true);
      }
    };

    checkMobile();
    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile);
  }, []);

  // Close mobile menu when route changes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isMobile) {
      setSidebarOpen(false);
    }
  }, [pathname, isMobile]);

  const isActive = (href: string) => {
    if (href === '/admin') {
      return pathname === '/admin';
    }
    return pathname.startsWith(href);
  };

  const toggleSidebar = () => {
    setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen);
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen bg-[#060606] overflow-hidden">
      {/* Mobile Overlay */}
      {isMobile && sidebarOpen && (
        <div
          className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 z-40 md:hidden"
          onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(false)}
        />
      )}

      {/* Sidebar */}
      <aside
        className={`
          ${isMobile ? 'fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-50' : 'relative'}
          ${sidebarOpen ? 'translate-x-0' : '-translate-x-full md:translate-x-0'}
          ${isMobile ? 'w-64' : sidebarOpen ? 'w-64' : 'w-20'}
          bg-[#111111] border-r border-[#7C3AED]/20 
          transition-all duration-300 
          flex flex-col
        `}
      >
        {/* Logo/Header */}
        <div className="h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-4 border-b border-[#7C3AED]/20">
          {(sidebarOpen || isMobile) && (
            <h1 className="font-heading text-lg font-bold text-[#7C3AED]">
              ADMIN
            </h1>
          )}
          <button
            onClick={toggleSidebar}
            className="p-2 hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/10 rounded-lg transition-colors min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] flex items-center justify-center"
            aria-label="Toggle sidebar"
          >
            {sidebarOpen ? (
              <X className="w-5 h-5" />
            ) : (
              <Menu className="w-5 h-5" />
            )}
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Navigation */}
        <nav className="flex-1 px-3 py-6 space-y-2 overflow-y-auto">
          {navigationItems.map((item) => {
            const Icon = item.icon;
            const active = isActive(item.href);

            return (
              <Link key={item.href} href={item.href}>
                <button
                  className={`
                    w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg 
                    transition-all duration-200
                    min-h-[44px]
                    ${
                      active
                        ? 'bg-[#7C3AED] text-white shadow-lg shadow-[#7C3AED]/50'
                        : 'text-[#9CA3AF] hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/10 hover:text-white'
                    }
                  `}
                >
                  <Icon className="w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0" />
                  {(sidebarOpen || isMobile) && (
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium">{item.label}</span>
                  )}
                </button>
              </Link>
            );
          })}
        </nav>

        {/* Logout Button */}
        <div className="p-3 border-t border-[#7C3AED]/20">
          <button
            className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-[#9CA3AF] hover:bg-red-500/10 hover:text-red-400 transition-all duration-200 min-h-[44px]"
          >
            <LogOut className="w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0" />
            {(sidebarOpen || isMobile) && (
              <span className="text-sm font-medium">Logout</span>
            )}
          </button>
        </div>
      </aside>

      {/* Main Content */}
      <main className="flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        {/* Top Bar */}
        <div className="h-16 bg-[#111111] border-b border-[#7C3AED]/20 flex items-center justify-between px-4 md:px-6">
          {/* Mobile Menu Button */}
          {isMobile && (
            <button
              onClick={toggleSidebar}
              className="p-2 hover:bg-[#7C3AED]/10 rounded-lg transition-colors min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] flex items-center justify-center md:hidden"
              aria-label="Open menu"
            >
              <Menu className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
            </button>
          )}

          <h2 className="font-heading text-base md:text-xl font-bold text-white truncate">
            Administration Panel
          </h2>
          
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 md:gap-4">
            <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#7C3AED] flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
              <span className="text-sm font-bold">A</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Content Area */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto bg-[#060606]">
          {children}
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

</content>
</file>

<content>
{
  "name": "@mmorpg/api",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "nest start --watch",
    "build": "nest build",
    "start": "node dist/main",
    "start:prod": "node dist/main",
    "lint": "eslint \"{src,apps,libs,test}/**/*.ts\"",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "clean": "rm -rf dist node_modules"
